TL;DR: 该研究分析了AI安全与AI伦理之间的紧张关系，提出了四种应对模式，并通过计算工具分析3550篇论文，发现两者在透明度、可复现性和治理机制等方面存在重叠，建议以"桥接问题"作为促进负责任AI的合作路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI安全与AI伦理在AI治理和公共辩论中日益显现的紧张关系形成了"负责任AI的分歧"，需要系统分析两者的关系并寻找建设性的合作路径。

Method: 提出四种应对紧张关系的模式分类，使用计算工具分析精心策划的3550篇论文数据集，绘制AI伦理和AI安全的研究版图，识别两者的区别和重叠问题。

Result: 发现AI伦理长期关注克服不公正和具体AI危害，而AI安全主要体现为预防性方法，专注于缓解AI能力风险；同时两者在透明度、可复现性和治理机制等核心研究关切上存在显著重叠。

Conclusion: 建议以"桥接问题"作为促进协作AI治理的建设性路径，提出整合共享考量的系列建议，同时指出研究局限性并探讨未来研究方向。

Abstract: Tensions between AI Safety (AIS) and AI Ethics (AIE) have increasingly surfaced in AI governance and public debates about AI, leading to what we term the "responsible AI divides". We introduce a model that categorizes four modes of engagement with the tensions: radical confrontation, disengagement, compartmentalized coexistence, and critical bridging. We then investigate how critical bridging, with a particular focus on bridging problems, offers one of the most viable constructive paths for advancing responsible AI. Using computational tools to analyze a curated dataset of 3,550 papers, we map the research landscapes of AIE and AIS to identify both distinct and overlapping problems. Our findings point to both thematic divides and overlaps. For example, we find that AIE has long grappled with overcoming injustice and tangible AI harms, whereas AIS has primarily embodied an anticipatory approach focused on the mitigation of risks from AI capabilities. At the same time, we find significant overlap in core research concerns across both AIE and AIS around transparency, reproducibility, and inadequate governance mechanisms. As AIE and AIS continue to evolve, we recommend focusing on bridging problems as a constructive path forward for enhancing collaborative AI governance. We offer a series of recommendations to integrate shared considerations into a collaborative approach to responsible AI. Alongside our proposal, we highlight its limitations and explore open problems for future research. All data including the fully annotated dataset of papers with code to reproduce our figures can be found at: https://github.com/gyevnarb/ai-safety-ethics.

</details>


### [269] [Hyper-learning and Unlearning: A Narrative Speculation on Urbanism in Media Ecologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14810)
*Anqi Wang,Yue Hua,Xinyue Zhang,Jindi Jia,Corneel Cannaerts,Michiel Helbig,Pan Hui*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 一篇关于数字媒体生态中学习重构的思辨性动画作品，以建筑教育为缩影，将城市重新定义为超学习装置，探讨算法系统和平台基础设施如何塑造认知与能动性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨数字媒体生态中学习方式的重新配置，特别是算法系统和平台基础设施如何影响认知、能动性和专业知识，批判制度性把关机制，揭示平台如何重塑专业知识、记忆和空间体验。

Method: 通过思辨性动画作品，以建筑教育为微观世界，将城市重新框架为超学习装置，展示城市空间、算法系统和平台基础设施如何共同塑造学习过程，同时呈现机器支持认知引发的"非学习"现象。

Result: 作品揭示了城市空间如何在后人类时代转变为教学基础设施，展示了算法系统和平台如何重新配置专业知识、记忆和空间体验，批判了制度性把关机制，并邀请观众重新思考学习与城市空间的关系。

Conclusion: 该思辨性动画项目表明，在后人类时代，城市空间已成为教学基础设施，算法系统和平台深刻重塑了学习、认知和专业知识，需要重新思考学习与城市空间的关系，并批判性地审视数字媒体生态中的制度性权力结构。

Abstract: Hyper-learning and Unlearning is a speculative animation that reflect how learning is reconfigured within digital media ecologies. Using architectural education as a microcosm, the work reframes the city as a hyper-learning apparatus where urban space, algorithmic systems, and platform infrastructures condition cognition and agency. By staging both hyper-learning and the unlearning induced by machine-supported cognition, the work critiques institutional gatekeeping while revealing how platforms reshape expertise, memory, and spatial experience. This project invites viewers to reconsider how urban space becomes pedagogical infrastructure in a posthumanism era.

</details>


### [270] [Are We Automating the Joy Out of Work? Designing AI to Augment Work, Not Meaning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14963)
*Jaspreet Ranjit,Ke Zhou,Swabha Swayamdipta,Daniele Quercia*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 研究发现AI暴露的工作任务与员工感知的工作意义存在错配：员工认为有自主权和幸福感的任务更易受AI影响，而开发者设计的AI系统特质（礼貌、严格、有想象力）与员工偏好（直接、宽容、实用）存在差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究关注了哪些工作任务会暴露给AI，但缺乏对员工是否认为这些任务有意义或只是繁琐工作的了解。本研究旨在探索：1）员工将AI暴露的任务与哪些工作意义维度关联；2）现有AI系统特质与员工期望之间的差距。

Method: 通过调查员工和开发者对171个代表性任务的看法，并使用语言模型将评分扩展到美国所有职业的10,131个计算机辅助任务。

Result: 令人担忧的是，员工认为与自主权或幸福感相关的任务可能不成比例地暴露给AI。同时发现设计差距：开发者强调礼貌、严格和想象力，而员工偏好直接、宽容和实用的系统。

Conclusion: 为解决这些差距，呼吁设计明确关注有意义工作和员工需求的AI，并提出包含五个部分的研究议程。

Abstract: Prior work has mapped which workplace tasks are exposed to AI, but less is known about whether workers perceive these tasks as meaningful or as busywork. We examined: (1) which dimensions of meaningful work do workers associate with tasks exposed to AI; and (2) how do the traits of existing AI systems compare to the traits workers want. We surveyed workers and developers on a representative sample of 171 tasks and use language models (LMs) to scale ratings to 10,131 computer-assisted tasks across all U.S. occupations. Worryingly, we find that tasks that workers associate with a sense of agency or happiness may be disproportionately exposed to AI. We also document design gaps: developers report emphasizing politeness, strictness, and imagination in system design; by contrast, workers prefer systems that are straightforward, tolerant, and practical. To address these gaps, we call for AI whose design explicitly focuses on meaningful work and worker needs, proposing a five-part research agenda.

</details>


### [271] [InterveneBench: Benchmarking LLMs for Intervention Reasoning and Causal Study Design in Real Social Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15542)
*Shaojie Shi,Zhengyu Shi,Lingran Zheng,Xinyu Su,Anna Xie,Bohao Lv,Rui Xu,Zijian Chen,Zhichao Chen,Guolei Liu,Naifu Zhang,Mingjian Dong,Zhuo Quan,Bohao Chen,Teqi Hao,Yuan Qi,Yinghui Xu,Libo Wu*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: InterveneBench是一个评估大语言模型在现实社会政策干预中因果推理能力的基准，包含744个实证研究，现有LLMs表现不佳，作者提出了STRIDES多智能体框架来提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基准无法评估大语言模型在真实世界政策干预中的端到端因果推理能力，而社会科学中的因果推断依赖于这种基于实际干预的研究设计推理。

Method: 提出了InterveneBench基准，包含744个来自实证社会科学研究的实例，要求模型在没有预定义因果图或结构方程的情况下推理政策干预和识别假设。为解决LLMs的局限性，进一步提出了STRIDES多智能体框架。

Result: 实验结果显示，最先进的大语言模型在这种设置下表现不佳，而提出的STRIDES多智能体框架相比现有推理模型取得了显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: InterveneBench填补了评估LLMs在真实社会政策干预中因果推理能力的空白，STRIDES框架为解决这一挑战提供了有效方法，推动了LLMs在社会科学因果推断中的应用。

Abstract: Causal inference in social science relies on end-to-end, intervention-centered research-design reasoning grounded in real-world policy interventions, but current benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability of large language models (LLMs). We present InterveneBench, a benchmark designed to assess such reasoning in realistic social settings. Each instance in InterveneBench is derived from an empirical social science study and requires models to reason about policy interventions and identification assumptions without access to predefined causal graphs or structural equations. InterveneBench comprises 744 peer-reviewed studies across diverse policy domains. Experimental results show that state-of-the-art LLMs struggle under this setting. To address this limitation, we further propose a multi-agent framework, STRIDES. It achieves significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art reasoning models. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Sii-yuning/STRIDES.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.CP'></div>

# q-fin.CP [[Back]](#toc)

### [272] [Performance-Driven Causal Signal Engineering for Financial Markets under Non-Stationarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13638)
*Lucas A. Souza*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 提出一个严格因果的前向观测框架，用于处理强非平稳时间序列，通过组合归一化指标和因果导数分量产生局部相位领先效应，在体制转换时放大信号，并采用滞后决策保持严格因果性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在处理强非平稳时间序列时面临因果性挑战，要么依赖非因果信息，要么预测能力有限。需要一种严格因果的方法来提取前瞻性结构，特别是在金融等非平稳复杂系统中。

Method: 结合稳健归一化的异质指标复合与因果计算的导数分量，产生局部相位领先效应；采用基于滞后的决策函数将观测映射为离散系统状态，执行延迟一步以保持严格时序；通过滚动训练-验证窗口进行参数选择并应用于样本外。

Result: 在高频金融时间序列上评估，零成本设置下显示出明显的风险重塑效应：轨迹更平滑、回撤减少，相对于直接暴露有改善。这代表了可达到性能的上限。

Conclusion: 因果信号工程可以在不依赖非因果信息、显式时间标签或高容量预测模型的情况下，在非平稳系统中生成前瞻性结构，为处理复杂非平稳系统提供了新思路。

Abstract: We introduce a performance-driven framework for constructing strictly causal forward-oriented observables in strongly non-stationary time series. The method combines a robustly normalized composite of heterogeneous indicators with a causally computed derivative component, yielding a local phase-leading effect that is amplified near regime transitions while remaining fully causal. A hysteresis-based decision functional maps the observable into discrete system states, with execution delayed by one step to preserve strict temporal ordering. Adaptation is achieved through a walk-forward scheme, in which model parameters are selected using rolling train--validation windows and subsequently applied out-of-sample. In this setting, the validation segment acts as an internal performance screen rather than as a statistical validation set, and no claims of generalization are inferred from it alone. The framework is evaluated on high-frequency financial time series as an experimentally accessible realization of a non-stationary complex system. Under a controlled zero-cost setting, the resulting dynamics exhibit a pronounced risk-reshaping effect, characterized by smoother trajectories and reduced drawdowns relative to direct exposure, and should be interpreted as an upper bound on achievable performance. These results illustrate how causal signal engineering can generate anticipatory structure in non-stationary systems without relying on non-causal information, explicit horizon labeling, or high-capacity predictive models.

</details>


### [273] [Conditioning on a Volatility Proxy Compresses the Apparent Timescale of Collective Market Correlation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14072)
*Yuda Bi,Vince D Calhoun*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 研究股市相关矩阵特征值的缓慢动态归因问题：发现VIX指数耦合的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck模型能显著降低有效弛豫时间，将大部分表观缓慢动态归因于可观测的VIX代理变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决金融时间序列中观察到的缓慢集体动态的归因问题：这种持续性究竟是系统内在的，还是由外部持久驱动因素（如市场恐慌指数VIX）所继承的？

Method: 使用VIX耦合的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck模型分析标普500指数60日滚动相关矩阵的最大特征值分数；通过贝叶斯信息准则(BIC)比较模型拟合；采用自相关匹配的安慰剂场、不相交的周重构、时序保留样本等多种验证方法。

Result: VIX耦合模型将有效弛豫时间从298天降至61天，BIC改善109；信息性VIX对数项贡献主要改善(BIC改善78.6)，而机械VIX代理无改善；安慰剂场检验失败，周重构和时序保留样本均支持场耦合模型；安静机制和场剥离残差自相关控制显示持续性崩溃。

Conclusion: 在所测试的随机模型类别中，以观测到的VIX代理变量为条件可以吸收大部分表观缓慢动态，表明市场相关性的持久性主要源于可观测的市场恐慌指数而非内在系统特性。

Abstract: We address the attribution problem for apparent slow collective dynamics: is the observed persistence intrinsic, or inherited from a persistent driver? For the leading eigenvalue fraction $ψ_1=λ_{\max}/N$ of S\&P 500 60-day rolling correlation matrices ($237$ stocks, 2004--2023), a VIX-coupled Ornstein--Uhlenbeck model reduces the effective relaxation time from $298$ to $61$ trading days and improves the fit over bare mean reversion by $Δ$BIC$=109$. On the decomposition sample, an informational residual of $\log(\mathrm{VIX})$ alone retains most of that gain ($Δ$BIC$=78.6$), whereas a mechanical VIX proxy alone does not improve the fit. Autocorrelation-matched placebo fields fail ($Δ$BIC$_{\max}=2.7$), disjoint weekly reconstructions still favor the field-coupled model ($Δ$BIC$=140$--$151$), and six anchored chronological holdouts preserve the out-of-sample advantage. Quiet-regime and field-stripped residual autocorrelation controls show the same collapse of persistence. Stronger hidden-variable extensions remain only partially supported. Within the tested stochastic class, conditioning on the observed VIX proxy absorbs most of the apparent slow dynamics.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PR'></div>

# q-fin.PR [[Back]](#toc)

### [274] [At-the-money short-time call-price asymptotics for new classes of exponential Lévy models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14760)
*Allen Hoffmeyer,Christian Houdré*

Main category: q-fin.PR

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在到期时间趋于零时，平值看涨期权价格和隐含波动率的渐近展开，针对一类对数收益服从Lévy过程的资产价格模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Lévy过程驱动的资产价格模型在短期到期时平值期权定价的渐近行为，特别是在Lévy过程属于α-稳定律的小时吸引域情况下的收敛速率。

Method: 在驱动Lévy过程属于α-稳定律(α∈(1,2))的小时吸引域假设下，利用Lévy测度在原点的正则变化性质，通过股份测度变换保持稳定吸引域和中心化常数有限性，推导平值看涨期权价格和隐含波动率的一阶渐近展开。

Result: 当Lévy过程无布朗运动成分时，获得形式为t^{1/α}ℓ(t)的新收敛速率(ℓ为慢变函数)；当有布朗运动成分时，跳跃贡献总是低阶项，平值看涨期权价格的√t主导行为是普适的且完全由特征三元组的高斯部分驱动。

Conclusion: Lévy过程在α-稳定律吸引域下的平值期权短期渐近行为由Lévy测度在原点的正则变化决定，布朗运动成分的存在与否显著影响收敛速率和主导项来源。

Abstract: We develop at-the-money call-price and implied volatility asymptotic expansions in time to maturity for a class of asset-price models whose log returns follow a Lévy process. Under mild assumptions placing the driving Lévy process in the small-time domain of attraction of an $α$-stable law with $α\in (1,2)$, we give first-order at-the-money call-price and implied volatility asymptotics. A key observation is that both the stable domain of attraction and the finiteness of the centering constant $\barμ$ are preserved under the share measure transformation, so that all of the distributional input needed for the call-price expansion can be read off from the regular variation of the Lévy measure near the origin. When the Lévy process has no Brownian component, new rates of convergence of the form $t^{1/α} \ell(t)$ where $\ell$ is a slowly varying function are obtained. We provide an example of an exponential Lévy model exhibiting this behavior, with $\ell$ not asymptotically constant, yielding a convergence rate of $(t / \log(1/t))^{1/α}$. In the case of a Lévyprocess with Brownian component, we show that the jump contribution is always lower order, so that the leading $\sqrt{t}$ behavior of the at-the-money call price is universal and driven entirely by the Gaussian part of the characteristic triplet.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.RM'></div>

# q-fin.RM [[Back]](#toc)

### [275] [Robust Optimal Strategies for Early Liquidation in Financial Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14546)
*Dohyun Ahn,Hongyi Jiang*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种鲁棒最优清算策略，通过在清算前进行早期资产清算来减轻价格冲击影响，最大化最坏情况下清算时的流动资产价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融危机期间，资产清算往往不可避免，但大量非流动性资产同时以低价出售会导致显著损失（价格冲击现象）。现有方法需要改进以应对这种挑战。

Method: 采用两期清算模型，允许在清算前进行早期清算以减轻清算时的价格冲击。提出鲁棒最优策略，在考虑其他银行早期清算决策不确定性的情况下，最大化最坏情况下清算时的流动资产价值。

Result: 在涉及永久性价格冲击的实际场景中推导出（半）闭式解，并分析了其对价格冲击大小的敏感性。在涉及银行间敞口的另一实际场景中识别了闭式表达式。

Conclusion: 虽然基于简化模型，但研究结果为开发能够减轻资产清算损失的鲁棒清算策略提供了有价值的指导。

Abstract: We study the problem of asset liquidation in financial systems. During financial crises, asset liquidation is often inevitable but can lead to substantial losses if a significant amount of illiquid assets are sold simultaneously at depressed prices -- a phenomenon known as price impact. To tackle this challenge, we consider a two-period liquidation model that allows for early liquidation prior to clearing, thereby mitigating price impact at clearing, and we develop a worst-case approach to solve the decision-making problem on the optimal size of early liquidation. Specifically, we propose a robust optimal strategy -- a tractable liquidation approach that maximizes the worst-case value of liquid assets at clearing, taking into account the uncertainty of other banks' early liquidation decisions. We derive a (semi-)closed-form representation of this strategy in a practical scenario involving permanent price impact and analyze its sensitivity to that impact's magnitude. We further identify its closed-form expression in another practical scenario featuring interbank exposures. Our findings, although built upon a stylized model, offer valuable guidelines for developing robust liquidation strategies that mitigate losses resulting from asset liquidation.

</details>


### [276] [A stochastic SIR model for cyber contagion: application to granular growth of firms and to insurance portfolio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15369)
*Caroline Hillairet,Olivier Lopez,Lionel Sopgoui*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 该研究提出一个结合多群体SIR传染病模型和公司增长模型的框架，用于评估网络攻击传染事件对公司财务健康和网络保险投资组合的影响，并应用于LockBit勒索软件攻击案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前网络攻击具有传染性，但现有模型未能充分结合经济学和网络安全的关键实证发现：公司规模和增长率分布的非高斯重尾特征，以及传染动态对公司规模和环境条件的强烈依赖性。

Method: 提出随机多群体SIR模型与公司增长粒度模型相结合的方法，网络攻击到达时间和持续时间由Cox过程（外部传染）和伯努利随机变量（关联公司传染）驱动，环境变异性支持随机情景生成和聚合超越概率计算。

Result: 应用于2024年5-7月LockBit勒索软件攻击和巴黎大区2929家公司组合，模型预测在50%概率下，保险公司在100天网络事件中需要补偿相当于最多两天收入的损失。

Conclusion: 该框架能够量化网络攻击对公司收入和保险投资组合的财务影响，为保险公司提供灾难建模标准指标，有助于评估网络事件的财务严重性。

Abstract: This work evaluates the impact of contagious cyber-events, over a finite horizon, on firms' financial health and on a cyber insurance portfolio. Our approach builds on key empirical findings from economics and cybersecurity. In economics, firm size and growth-rate distributions are non-Gaussian and exhibit heavy tails. In cybersecurity, contagion dynamics strongly depend on firm size and environmental conditions. To capture these features, we propose a stochastic multi-group SIR model coupled with a granular model of firm growth. This framework allows us to quantify the financial impact of cyber-attacks on firms' revenues and on the insurer's portfolio. In the model, the arrival time and duration of cyber-attacks are driven by a combination of a Cox process and a Bernoulli random variable. The Cox process represents external contagion, with an intensity given by the force of infection derived from the stochastic SIR dynamics. The Bernoulli component captures contagion originating from an infected sister or subsidiary firm. Environmental variability enables stochastic scenario generation and the computation of aggregate exceedance probabilities, a standard metric in catastrophe modeling that provides insurers with immediate insight into the financial severity of an event. We apply the framework to the LockBit ransomware attacks observed between May and July 2024. For a portfolio of 2,929 firms located in Ile-de-France, the model predicts that, with 50% probability, the insurer will need to compensate losses equivalent to up to two days of revenue over a 100-day cyber incident.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [277] [Verification and Forward Invariance of Control Barrier Functions for Differential-Algebraic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13509)
*Hongchao Zhang,Mohamad H. Kazma,Meiyi Ma,Taylor T. Johnson,Ahmad F. Taha*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对微分代数方程（DAE）系统的DAE感知控制障碍函数（CBF）框架，通过投影向量场将代数约束纳入安全控制设计，确保安全集前向不变性同时保持代数约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微分代数方程（DAE）在电力网络、化工过程和多体系统中普遍存在，其中代数约束编码了物理守恒定律。这些系统的安全性至关重要，但由于代数约束限制了允许的状态轨迹，安全控制具有挑战性。现有的CBF方法不能直接应用于DAE，因为CBF条件可能与约束流形发生冲突。

Method: 引入DAE感知CBF，通过投影向量场将微分代数结构纳入考虑。推导确保安全集前向不变性同时保持代数约束的条件，并将框架扩展到高指数DAE。开发系统验证框架，建立DAE感知CBF几何正确性和可行性的必要和充分条件。对于多项式系统提供平方和证书，对于非多项式和神经网络候选使用可满足性模理论进行证伪。

Result: 在风力涡轮机和柔性连杆机械臂系统上验证了该方法的有效性，证明了DAE感知CBF能够确保安全控制同时满足代数约束。

Conclusion: 提出的DAE感知CBF框架成功解决了DAE系统中安全控制的挑战，通过将代数约束纳入控制障碍函数设计，确保了系统安全性同时保持物理约束，为DAE系统的安全控制提供了系统化的理论框架和验证方法。

Abstract: Differential-algebraic equations (DAEs) arise in power networks, chemical processes, and multibody systems, where algebraic constraints encode physical conservation laws. The safety of such systems is critical, yet safe control is challenging because algebraic constraints restrict allowable state trajectories. Control barrier functions (CBFs) provide computationally efficient safety filters for ordinary differential equation (ODE) systems. However, existing CBF methods are not directly applicable to DAEs due to potential conflicts between the CBF condition and the constraint manifold. This paper introduces DAE-aware CBFs that incorporate the differential-algebraic structure through projected vector fields. We derive conditions that ensure forward invariance of safe sets while preserving algebraic constraints and extend the framework to higher-index DAEs. A systematic verification framework is developed, establishing necessary and sufficient conditions for geometric correctness and feasibility of DAE-aware CBFs. For polynomial systems, sum-of-squares certificates are provided, while for nonpolynomial and neural network candidates, satisfiability modulo theories are used for falsification. The approach is validated on wind turbine and flexible-link manipulator systems.

</details>


### [278] [A Lyapunov Characterization of Robust D-Stability with Application to Decentralized Integral Control of LTI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13608)
*John-Paolo Casasanta,John W. Simpson-Porco*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了矩阵D-稳定性的Lyapunov型充要条件，并将其应用于MIMO LTI系统的分散积分控制分析，为控制回路的连接/断开提供了稳定性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 矩阵D-稳定性在经济学、生物系统和分散控制等应用中很重要，但缺乏系统的Lyapunov型分析框架。需要为MIMO系统的分散积分控制提供鲁棒稳定性条件，特别是在控制回路动态连接/断开的情况下。

Method: 1. 建立了矩阵D-稳定性的Lyapunov型充要条件；2. 将这些条件应用于MIMO LTI系统的分散积分控制分析；3. 推导了低增益条件下的稳定性条件；4. 分析了控制回路任意连接/断开时的稳定性。

Result: 1. 获得了矩阵D-稳定性的Lyapunov型充要条件；2. 为MIMO系统的分散积分控制提供了稳定性保证；3. 在低增益条件下确保系统稳定；4. 系统在控制回路任意连接/断开时保持稳定。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了矩阵D-稳定性的Lyapunov理论框架，成功应用于MIMO系统的分散积分控制，为实际工程中控制回路的动态配置提供了理论保证。

Abstract: The concept of matrix D-stability plays an important role in applications, ranging from economic and biological system models to decentralized control. Here we provide necessary and sufficient Lyapunov-type conditions for the robust (block) D-stability property. We leverage this characterization as part of a novel Lyapunov analysis of decentralized integral control for MIMO LTI systems, providing sufficient conditions guaranteeing stability under low-gain and under arbitrary connection and disconnection of individual control loops.

</details>


### [279] [Peak-Load Pricing and Investment Cost Recovery with Duration-Limited Storage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13678)
*Daniel Shen,Marija Ilic,John Parsons*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究将经典两期峰荷定价模型扩展至包含持续时间受限的储能系统，分析储能约束如何影响最优定价和投资决策，发现储能主要通过固定成本而非效率损失获得稀缺溢价，且能源容量成本按峰值事件而非总峰值小时数分摊。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统发电与储能存在根本差异：储能受持续时间限制，其存储能量容量约束了供电时长。需要理解这些约束如何影响最优定价和投资决策，特别是在太阳能主导的电力系统中。

Method: 扩展经典两期峰荷定价模型以包含持续时间受限的储能系统，采用太阳能主导系统的典型假设，将峰谷价格与储能投资成本、往返效率和峰值持续时间联系起来。

Result: 储能的大部分稀缺溢价来自固定成本而非往返效率损失的可变成本；由于持续时间约束，储能按峰值事件而非总峰值小时数回收能源容量成本；数值示例展示了均衡价格和容量投资的影响。

Conclusion: 储能持续时间约束导致定价和投资回收机制与传统发电不同，储能主要通过固定成本获得回报，能源容量成本按峰值事件分摊，这对电力市场设计和储能投资决策有重要启示。

Abstract: Energy storage shifts energy from off-peak periods to on-peak periods. Unlike conventional generation, storage is duration-limited: the stored energy capacity constrains the duration over which it can supply power. To understand how these constraints affect optimal pricing and investment decisions, we extend the classic two-period peak-load pricing model to include duration-limited storage. By adopting assumptions typical of solar-dominated systems, we link on- and off-peak prices to storage investment costs, round-trip efficiency, and the duration of the peak period. The bulk of the scarcity premium from on-peak prices is associated with the fixed costs of storage as opposed to variable costs stemming from round-trip efficiency losses. Unlike conventional generators, the binding duration constraints lead storage to recover energy capacity costs on a per-peak-event basis instead of amortizing these costs over total peak hours. A numerical example illustrates the implications for equilibrium prices and capacity investment.

</details>


### [280] [Non-trivial consensus on directed signed matrix-weighted networks with compound measurement noises and time-varying topologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13828)
*Tianmu Niu,Xiaoqun Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究有向符号矩阵加权网络中，在加性和乘性测量噪声与时变拓扑下，实现非平凡共识的协议设计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统共识算法通常假设完全合作环境，但现实网络中常存在对抗性交互、测量噪声和时变拓扑。本文旨在探索在更复杂条件下（包括跨维度的合作与对抗交互、复合测量噪声、时变网络结构）实现非平凡共识的可能性。

Method: 基于矩阵加权拉普拉斯性质建立随机动态模型，利用随机微分方程理论设计控制协议。协议中的控制增益函数平衡了时间累积效应、渐近衰减特性和噪声有限能量，仅要求边权重矩阵元素有界，放宽了对拓扑连通性和结构平衡性的要求。

Result: 提出的协议能保证均方和几乎必然的非平凡共识。对于任何预定的非零共识状态，所有智能体都能在均方和几乎必然意义上收敛到该值。协议在更宽松的连通性条件下工作，无需结构平衡性假设。

Conclusion: 研究表明，即使在存在复合测量噪声和时变拓扑的情况下，具有合作与对抗跨维度交互的群体也能达成共识，挑战了传统认为共识只能在完全合作环境中实现的观念。

Abstract: This paper studies non-trivial consensus--a relatively novel and unexplored convergence behavior--on directed signed matrix-weighted networks subject to both additive and multiplicative measurement noises under time-varying topologies. Building upon grounded matrix-weighted Laplacian properties, a stochastic dynamic model is established that simultaneously captures inter-dimensional cooperative and antagonistic interactions, compound measurement noises and time-varying network structures. Based on stochastic differential equations theory, protocols that guarantee mean square and almost sure non-trivial consensus are proposed. Specifically, for any predetermined non-trivial consensus state, all agents are proven to converge toward this non-zero value in the mean-square and almost-sure senses. The design of control gain function in our protocols highlights a balanced consideration of the cumulative effect over time, the asymptotic decay property and the finite energy corresponding to measurement noises. Notably, the conditions on time-varying topologies in our protocols only require boundedness of elements in edge weight matrices, which facilitate the practicality of concept "time-varying topology" in matrix-weighted network consensus algorithms. Furthermore, the proposed protocols operate under milder connectivity conditions and no requirements on structural (un)balance properties. The work in this paper demonstrates that groups with both cooperative and antagonistic inter-dimensional interactions can achieve consensus even in the presence of compound measurement noises and time-varying topologies, challenging the conventional belief that consensus is attainable only in fully cooperative settings.

</details>


### [281] [Fully distributed consensus control for stochastic multi-agent systems under undirected and directed topologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13862)
*Xuping Hou,Xiaofeng Zong,Yong He*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 首次为有向和无向图拓扑下的随机一致性系统设计了完全分布式控制协议，建立了闭环系统解的存在唯一性，并提供了收敛率的显式指数估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决随机一致性系统中完全分布式控制协议设计的挑战，填补文献中关于路径依赖、高度非线性闭环系统解的存在唯一性理论空白，特别是在有向图拓扑下的控制问题。

Method: 为有向图设计了统一的完全分布式控制协议，为无向图设计了增强型协议（含可调参数）。建立了路径依赖高度非线性闭环系统的存在唯一性理论，提供了收敛率的显式指数估计。

Result: 首次在有向图下实现了随机多智能体系统的均方和几乎必然一致性；无向图下协议在保证一致性的同时实现了更快的收敛速度；提供了收敛率与系统参数关系的明确解析。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了随机一致性控制理论的重要空白，为有向和无向图拓扑提供了有效的完全分布式控制方案，并通过仿真验证了理论结果的有效性。

Abstract: This work aims to address the design of fully distributed control protocols for stochastic consensus, and, for the first time, establishes the existence and uniqueness of solutions for the path-dependent and highly nonlinear closed-loop systems under both undirected and directed topologies, bridging a critical gap in the literature. For the case of directed graphs, a unified fully distributed control protocol is designed for the first time to guarantee mean square and almost sure consensus of stochastic multi-agent systems under directed graphs. Moreover, an enhanced fully distributed protocol with additional tunable parameters designed for undirected graphs is proposed, which guarantees stochastic consensus while achieving superior convergence speed. Additionally, our work provides explicit exponential estimates for the corresponding convergence rates of stochastic consensus, elucidating the relationship between the exponential convergence rate and the system parameters. Simulations validate the theoretical results.

</details>


### [282] [Fully Distributed Adaptive Consensus Approach for Economic Dispatch Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13883)
*Arnab Pal,Suman Singha Roy,Asim Kumar Naskar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于多智能体分布式共识策略的经济负荷调度方法，通过自适应耦合权重机制和虚拟节点处理时变负荷，在通信中断情况下仍能保持系统稳定和最优功率分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能电网中经济负荷调度问题需要高效、鲁棒的解决方案。传统集中式方法存在单点故障风险，而现有分布式方法在收敛性、鲁棒性和处理时变负荷方面仍有不足。需要开发一种完全去中心化的自适应方法，能够在通信中断和负荷波动情况下保持系统稳定和最优运行。

Method: 采用多智能体分布式共识策略，通过自适应耦合权重机制实现发电机增量成本值的一致性。引入虚拟节点处理时变负荷需求，设计完全去中心化的控制协议，适用于有约束和无约束的发电机容量场景。使用李雅普诺夫稳定性分析证明系统稳定性，假设智能体间通信图为无向连通图。

Result: 在IEEE 30节点测试系统中进行的MATLAB仿真验证了方法的有效性。结果表明该方法具有高精度、良好的适应性和计算效率，能够在通信中断（通过切换网络拓扑模拟链路故障）和时变负荷情况下保持系统稳定，确保总发电量始终匹配动态负荷需求。

Conclusion: 提出的多智能体分布式共识方法为智能电网经济负荷调度提供了一种鲁棒、自适应的解决方案。该方法完全去中心化，能够处理通信中断和时变负荷，在保证系统稳定的同时实现最优功率分配，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: This research presents a novel approach to solving the economic load dispatch (ELD) problem in smart grid systems by leveraging a multi-agent distributed consensus strategy. The core idea revolves around achieving agreement among generators on their incremental cost values, thereby enabling an optimal allocation of power generation. To enhance convergence and robustness, the study introduces an adaptive coupling weight mechanism within a fully decentralized consensus framework, carefully designed with appropriate initial settings for incremental costs. The proposed distributed control protocol is versatile it functions effectively in both constrained and unconstrained generator capacity scenarios. Importantly, the methodology ensures that total power generation continuously matches dynamic load demands throughout the dispatch process, maintaining system-wide balance. To accommodate fluctuating and time varying load profiles, a dummy node is incorporated into the network architecture, acting as a flexible proxy for real time demand changes. The resilience of the method is further evaluated under communication disruptions, specifically by analyzing generator link failures through a switching network topology. Stability of the system is rigorously established using a Lyapunov-based analysis, assuming an undirected and connected communication graph among agents. To validate the practical efficacy of the proposed technique, comprehensive simulations are conducted on the IEEE 30 bus test system within the MATLAB environment, confirming its accuracy, adaptability, and computational efficiency in realistic smart grid conditions.

</details>


### [283] [On the Impact of Operating Points on Small-Signal Stability: Decentralized Stability Sets via Scaled Relative Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13922)
*Eder Baron-Prada,Adolfo Anta,Florian Dörfler*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于频域的分散式框架，用于分析变流器主导电力系统中运行点对小信号稳定性的影响，将集中式稳定性评估分解为分散的几何测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在变流器主导的电力系统中，运行点变化会影响系统的小信号稳定性。传统集中式分析方法计算复杂，需要开发分散式框架来简化稳定性评估。

Method: 扩展缩放相对图(SRG)分析到线性参数变化(LPV)系统，利用变流器导纳对稳态运行点的仿射依赖性，将集中式稳定性评估分解为分散的频率域几何测试。

Result: 每个变流器可以独立评估其可行稳定区域，表示为参数空间中的线性不等式集合。该框架适用于并网(GFL)和构网(GFM)变流器，验证结果证实了其有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的分散式频域框架为变流器主导电力系统的小信号稳定性分析提供了有效的几何表征方法，简化了运行点对稳定性影响的评估过程。

Abstract: This paper presents a decentralized frequency-domain framework to characterize the influence of the operating point on the small-signal stability of converter-dominated power systems. The approach builds on Scaled Relative Graph (SRG) analysis, extended here to address Linear Parameter-Varying (LPV) systems. By exploiting the affine dependence of converter admittances on their steady-state operating points, the centralized small-signal stability assessment of the grid is decomposed into decentralized, frequency-wise geometric tests. Each converter can independently evaluate its feasible stability region, expressed as a set of linear inequalities in its parameter space. The framework provides closed-form geometric characterizations applicable to both grid-following (GFL) and grid-forming (GFM) converters, and validation results confirm its effectiveness.

</details>


### [284] [Safety in Admittance Control using Reference Trajectory Shaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13959)
*Chayan Kumar Paul,Bhabani Shankar Dey,Indra Narayan Kar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于切换模型参考导纳控制的框架，通过参考轨迹整形实现安全、柔顺的人机协作，在保证柔顺性的同时确保任务空间安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机协作中，需要在保证柔顺交互的同时确保安全性，避免机器人对人或环境造成伤害。现有方法往往难以同时满足柔顺性和安全性要求，特别是在存在扰动的情况下。

Method: 采用切换模型参考导纳控制框架，根据任务柔顺性和任务空间安全要求生成可变导纳参数。集成不变性控制确保参考轨迹保持在允许区域内，使用共同二次Lyapunov函数分析切换系统稳定性。

Result: 仿真验证表明该方法在双连杆机械臂上有效，与现有方法相比表现更优。实时单连杆机械臂实验验证了控制器的实际可行性，能够同时实现柔顺交互和安全性。

Conclusion: 该切换模型参考导纳控制框架能够有效实现安全、柔顺的人机协作，通过参考轨迹整形和不变性控制确保安全性，Lyapunov稳定性分析证明了跟踪误差的渐近收敛性。

Abstract: This paper presents a switched model reference admittance control framework to achieve safe and compliant human-robot collaboration through reference trajectory shaping. The proposed method generates variable admittance parameters according to task compliance and task-space safety requirements. Additionally, a disturbance bound is incorporated to enhance robustness against disturbances. Safety guarantees are explicitly established by integrating invariance control, ensuring that the reference trajectory remains within the admissible region. Stability of the switched system is analyzed using a common quadratic Lyapunov function, which confirms asymptotic convergence of the tracking error. The effectiveness of the approach is demonstrated through simulations on a two link manipulator and comparisons with existing methods are also presented. Furthermore, real time implementation on a single link manipulator validates the practical feasibility of the controller, highlighting its ability to achieve both compliance and safety in physical interaction scenarios.

</details>


### [285] [Discrete-time linear quadratic stochastic control with equality-constrained inputs: Application to energy demand response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13975)
*Leo Seugnet,Shuang Gao*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究离散时间随机线性二次控制问题，针对合作智能体群体，在总控制输入硬等式约束下，应用于可再生能源系统的需求响应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源系统中需求响应的实际需求，需要协调多个智能体（如住宅电池）在总控制输入约束下的合作控制

Method: 使用动态规划和KKT条件推导最优控制律，得到基于离散时间Riccati类递归方程的控制解

Result: 建立了考虑硬等式约束的最优解，应用于住宅电池网络充电协调，实现精确功率跟踪同时考虑个体SoC目标

Conclusion: 提出的控制方法能有效解决合作智能体在总控制约束下的随机线性二次控制问题，适用于可再生能源系统的需求响应应用

Abstract: We investigate the discrete-time stochastic linear quadratic control problem for a population of cooperative agents under the hard equality constraint on total control inputs, motivated by demand response in renewable energy systems. We establish the optimal solution that respects hard equality constraints for systems with additive noise in the dynamics. The optimal control law is derived using dynamic programming and Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions, and the resulting control solution depends on a discrete-time Riccati-like recursive equation. Application examples of coordinating the charging of a network of residential batteries to absorb excess solar power generation are demonstrated, and the proposed control is shown to achieve exact power tracking while considering individual State-of-Charge (SoC) objectives

</details>


### [286] [LLM-Guided Safe Reinforcement Learning for Energy System Topology Reconfiguration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14018)
*Zongyan Zhang,Chao Shen,Xu Wan,Jie Song,Mingyang Sun*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出结合大语言模型和安全软演员-评论家算法的智能拓扑控制框架，解决电力系统拓扑重构中的高维组合动作空间和安全约束问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源渗透率提高和电气化需求波动性增加导致电力系统运行不确定性增大。传统拓扑重构方法面临交流潮流约束和离散开关决策共存带来的非线性非凸优化问题，计算复杂度高。现有强化学习方法面临高维组合动作空间和决策安全性挑战

Method: 提出安全智能拓扑控制框架，整合大语言模型与安全软演员-评论家架构。将运行电压和热限约束重构为平滑安全成本信号，在约束马尔可夫决策过程中进行风险感知策略优化。引入基于知识的Safety-LLM模块，通过领域知识和状态感知推理优化不安全或次优的转换

Result: 在IEEE 36总线和118总线Grid2Op基准测试中，该方法在奖励、生存时间和安全指标方面持续改进，相比SAC、ACE及其安全增强变体获得更高奖励、更长生存时间和更低安全成本

Conclusion: 结合基于LLM的推理与安全强化学习，能够实现可扩展且可靠的电网拓扑控制，为解决电力系统拓扑重构中的安全性和可扩展性问题提供了有前景的解决方案

Abstract: The increasing penetration of renewable generation and the growing variability of electrified demand introduce substantial operational uncertainty to modern power systems. Topology reconfiguration is widely recognized as an effective and economical means to enhance grid resilience. Due to the coexistence of AC power-flow constraints and discrete switching decisions, topology reconfiguration in large-scale systems leads to a highly nonlinear and nonconvex optimization problem, making traditional methods computationally prohibitive. Consequently, several studies have explored reinforcement learning-based approaches to improve scalability and operational efficiency. However, its practical implementation is challenged by the high-dimensional combinatorial action space and the need to ensure safety during learning-based decision-making. To address these challenges, this paper presents a safe and intelligent topology control framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) with a Safety Soft Actor-Critic (Safety-SAC) architecture. Operational voltage and thermal limits are reformulated into smooth safety-cost signals, enabling risk-aware policy optimization within a constrained Markov decision process. A knowledge-based Safety-LLM module is further introduced to refine unsafe or suboptimal transitions through domain knowledge and state-informed reasoning, thus guiding the learning agent toward safer and more effective switching actions. Experiments on the IEEE 36-bus and 118-bus Grid2Op benchmarks show that the proposed method consistently improves reward, survival time, and safety metrics, achieving higher reward, longer survival, and lower safety cost compared with SAC, ACE, and their safety-enhanced variants. These results demonstrate the potential of combining LLM-based reasoning with safe reinforcement learning to achieve scalable and reliable grid topology control.

</details>


### [287] [Energy-Aware Integrated Proactive Maintenance Planning and Production Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14060)
*Hongliang Li,Herschel C. Pangborn,Ilya Kovalenko*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出分层双级控制框架，联合优化预防性维护和生产调度，在实时电价下平衡机器维护与能耗成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时电价为制造商提供降低能耗成本的机会，但机器退化会降低处理能力并增加能耗，预防性维护需要停机时间，导致维护时机与能耗成本之间的权衡困境

Method: 分层双级控制框架：高层优化确定预防性维护计划，嵌入低层模型预测控制作为子问题；运行时低层MPC执行闭环生产调度，最小化实际电价下的能耗成本

Result: 在锂离子电池组装配线案例研究中，该框架能策略性地将维护从瓶颈和高电价时段移开，满足日生产目标的同时降低能耗成本

Conclusion: 提出的联合优化框架有效解决了机器退化、预防性维护和实时电价下的生产调度问题，实现了能耗成本降低和生产目标达成的平衡

Abstract: Demand-side energy management, such as the real-time pricing (RTP) program, offers manufacturers opportunities to reduce energy costs by shifting production to low-price hours. However, this strategy is challenging to implement when machine degradation is considered, as degraded machines have decreased processing capacity and increased energy consumption. Proactive maintenance (PM) can restore machine health but requires production downtime, creating a challenging trade-off: scheduling maintenance during low-price periods sacrifices energy savings opportunities, while deferring maintenance leads to capacity losses and higher energy consumption. To address this challenge, we propose a hierarchical bi-level control framework that jointly optimizes PM planning and runtime production scheduling, considering the machine degradation. A higher-level optimization, with the lower-level model predictive control (MPC) embedded as a sub-problem, determines PM plans that minimize total operational costs under day-ahead RTP. At runtime, the lower-level MPC executes closed-loop production scheduling to minimize energy costs under realized RTP, meeting delivery targets. Simulation results from a lithium-ion battery pack assembly line case study demonstrate that the framework strategically shifts PM away from bottlenecks and high-price hours, meeting daily production targets while reducing energy costs.

</details>


### [288] [On Globally Optimal Stochastic Policy Gradient Methods for Domain Randomized LQR Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14197)
*Alex Nguyen-Le,Nikolai Matni*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出在域随机化的LQR控制问题中，采用每步梯度下降都重新采样新系统的随机策略梯度方法，相比固定系统集的方法能获得更优、更稳定的控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 域随机化是减少模型不匹配导致的仿真到现实差距的有效方法，但现有方法缺乏理论指导的优化方案设计原则。本文旨在填补这一空白，为域随机化提供理论保证的优化框架。

Method: 采用随机策略梯度下降方法处理域随机化的线性二次调节器合成问题。核心创新是在每个梯度步都重新采样新系统来计算梯度，而不是在固定系统集上评估梯度。

Result: 理论证明在适当超参数选择下，通过重复采样新系统获得的随机梯度能收敛到全局最优解。实验表明该方法相比不重新采样的方法能产生更好的控制器，且最终控制器的变异性更低。

Conclusion: 采样通常是快速廉价的操作，因此在每次迭代中使用新采样系统计算策略梯度优于在固定系统集上评估梯度。这为域随机化提供了理论指导的优化方案设计原则。

Abstract: Domain randomization is a simple, effective, and flexible scheme for obtaining robust feedback policies aimed at reducing the sim-to-real gap due to model mismatch. While domain randomization methods have yielded impressive demonstrations in the robotics-learning literature, general and theoretically motivated principles for designing optimization schemes that effectively leverage the randomization are largely unexplored. We address this gap by considering a stochastic policy gradient descent method for the domain randomized linear-quadratic regulator synthesis problem, a situation simple enough to provide theoretical guarantees. In particular, we demonstrate that stochastic gradients obtained by repeatedly sampling new systems at each gradient step converge to global optima with appropriate hyperparameters choices, and yield better controllers with lower variability in the final controllers when compared to approaches that do not resample. Sampling is often a quick and cheap operation, so computing policy gradients with newly sampled systems at each iteration is preferable to evaluating gradients on a fixed set of systems.

</details>


### [289] [Geometry-Aware Set-Membership Multilateration: Directional Bounds and Anchor Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14263)
*Giuseppe C. Calafiore*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究在有界测量误差下的基于距离的定位中的锚点选择问题，提出离线设计和在线不确定性评估方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在基于距离的定位中，锚点的选择对定位精度有重要影响。现有方法主要关注凸定位集，但如何选择最优锚点子集以及如何在线评估定位不确定性仍需深入研究。

Method: 1. 离线设计：基于锚点坐标的居中散布矩阵S(A)，推导几何E型和D型评分，λ_min(S(A))控制多面体证书的最差方向和直径代理，det S(A)控制主轴体积代理
2. 在线评估：利用定位集X=Χd∩H的特殊结构，推导H的单纯形聚合包围球和精确支持函数公式，得到实际定位集的有限混合边界

Result: 1. 基于几何的子集选择接近oracle组合搜索
2. D评分在面积导向度量中略优于E评分
3. 新的H感知证书能够紧密跟踪所选定位集的实际大小

Conclusion: 提出的几何评分方法能有效选择锚点子集，新的不确定性评估方法即使在多面体证书退化时也能提供有限边界，为有界测量误差下的定位问题提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we study anchor selection for range-based localization under unknown-but-bounded measurement errors. We start from the convex localization set $\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$ recently introduced in \cite{CalafioreSIAM}, where $\Xd$ is a polyhedron obtained from pairwise differences of squared-range
  equations between the unknown location $x$ and the anchors, and $\Hset$ is the intersection of upper-range hyperspheres. Our first goal is \emph{offline} design: we derive geometry-only E- and D-type scores from the centered scatter matrix $S(A)=AQ_mA\tran$, where $A$ collects the anchor coordinates and $Q_m=I_m-\frac{1}{m}\one\one\tran$ is the centering projector, showing that $λ_{\min}(S(A))$ controls worst-direction and diameter surrogates for the polyhedral certificate $\Xd$, while $\det S(A)$ controls principal-axis volume surrogates. Our second goal is \emph{online} uncertainty assessment for a selected subset of anchors: exploiting the special structure $\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$, we derive a simplex-aggregated enclosing ball for $\Hset$ and an exact support-function formula for $\Hset$, which lead to finite hybrid bounds for the actual localization set $\X$, even when the polyhedral certificate deteriorates. Numerical experiments are performed in two dimensions, showing that geometry-based subset selection is close to an oracle combinatorial search, that the D-score slightly dominates the E-score for the area-oriented metric considered here, and that the new $\Hset$-aware certificates track the realized size of the selected localization set closely.

</details>


### [290] [Topological Conditions for Echo Chamber Formation under the FJ model: A Cluster Consensus-based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14298)
*Aashi Shrinate,Twinkle Tripathy,Laxmidhar Behera*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究Friedkin-Johnsen模型中的集群共识条件，以解释社交网络中回声室的形成机制，提出了与网络权重和固执参数无关的拓扑条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交网络中用户经常形成回声室（观点一致的群体），只接触符合现有信念的信息。集群共识可以表示社交网络中的回声室，因此研究FJ模型中集群共识的条件，以确定导致回声室形成的网络特性。

Method: 基于拓扑结构提出集群共识的必要和充分条件，这些条件不依赖于网络边权重和固执值参数。条件适用于任意有向图，并开发了计算可行的方法来验证这些条件。

Result: 提出了与边权重和固执值无关的拓扑条件，解释了现实世界中回声室常见的蝴蝶结结构形成机制，并开发了验证这些条件的计算方法。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解社交网络中回声室的形成提供了理论框架，提出的拓扑条件具有普适性，能够解释现实网络结构特征，并提供了实用的验证方法。

Abstract: The Friedkin-Johnsen (FJ) model is a popular opinion dynamics model that explains the disagreement that can occur even among closely interacting individuals. Cluster consensus is a special type of disagreement, where agents in a network split into subgroups such that those within a subgroup agree and those in different subgroups disagree. In large-scale social networks, users often distribute into echo chambers (i.e. groups of users with aligned views) while discussing contested issues such as electoral politics, social norms, etc. Additionally, they are exposed only to opinions and news sources that align with their existing beliefs. Hence, the interaction network plays a key role in the formation of an echo chamber. Since cluster consensus can represent echo chambers in a social network, we examine the conditions for cluster consensus under the FJ model with the objective of determining the properties of the interaction network that lead to echo chamber formation. We present topology-based necessary and sufficient conditions for cluster consensus under the FJ model, regardless of the edge weights in the network and stubbornness values (which are difficult to estimate parameters in a social network). A major advantage of the proposed results is that they are applicable to arbitrary digraphs. Moreover, using the proposed conditions, we explain the emergence of bow-tie structures which are often observed in real-world echo chambers. Finally, we also develop a computationally feasible methodology to verify the proposed conditions for cluster consensus.

</details>


### [291] [Low-Data Predictive Maintenance of Railway Station Doors and Elevators Using Bayesian Proxy Flow Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14384)
*Waldemar Bauer,Jerzy Baranowski*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于低数据的预测性维护框架，用于铁路车站的自动门和电梯，利用客流数据推断设备运行负荷，结合成本感知调度优化维护计划


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对缺乏直接状态监测的设备（如自动门、电梯），需要利用现有数据（客流信息）进行预测性维护，以降低维护成本并提高维护效率

Method: 1) 使用贝叶斯方法在简化车站图上建模客流，考虑不确定的总量和路径分配；2) 通过随机代理关系将推断的客流转换为设备运行负荷；3) 结合基于时间和运行周期的维护阈值估计维护条件概率；4) 采用成本感知调度模型优化维护活动安排

Result: 模拟案例研究表明，代理运行数据能以低成本支持维护调度，相比基于日历的策略能改善维护活动的协调性

Conclusion: 该框架证明了利用现有代理数据（如客流信息）进行预测性维护的可行性，能以低增量成本实现比传统日历策略更好的维护协调

Abstract: This paper proposes a low-data predictive maintenance framework for automatic doors and elevators in a railway station building. The method is intended for assets without direct condition monitoring, where only aggregate passenger traffic information and expert knowledge about movement patterns are available. Passenger flows are modeled on a reduced station graph using a Bayesian formulation with uncertain totals and routing shares. The inferred flows are converted into approximate operating-cycle loads for doors and elevators through simple stochastic proxy relations. These loads are combined with uncertain age- and cycle-based maintenance thresholds to estimate the probability that predefined maintenance conditions have been reached. A cost-aware scheduling model is then used to align maintenance activities while accounting for service costs, disruption, delay penalties, and grouping opportunities within each asset class. The framework is illustrated on a simulated case study reflecting a real station layout. The results show that proxy operational data can support maintenance scheduling with low incremental implementation cost and can improve alignment relative to a calendar-based policy.

</details>


### [292] [Data-Enabled Policy and Value Iteration for Continuous-Time Linear Quadratic Output Feedback Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14386)
*Jun Xie,Yuan-Hua Ni,Yiqin Yang,Bo Xu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出针对连续时间LQR问题的无模型策略迭代和价值迭代算法，通过改进的替代状态构造方法，无需系统先验知识，具有更好的数值稳定性和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决连续时间线性二次调节器问题中状态不可测量且系统动力学未知的挑战，从直接数据驱动控制的角度出发，避免传统方法对系统先验知识的依赖。

Method: 1. 重新审视输入输出滤波向量的数据特性，引入QR分解改进替代状态构造方法；2. 将原问题转化为在已知输入矩阵的替代状态上的等效LQR问题；3. 设计模型无关的策略迭代和价值迭代算法，充分利用满行秩替代状态数据矩阵。

Result: 提出的算法具有显著优势：无需系统阶数先验知识，无需计算信号导数和积分；迭代方程可直接求解而不依赖传统最小二乘范式；在单输出和多输出设置下均保证可行性；具有优越的数值稳定性、更低的数据需求和更高的计算效率。

Conclusion: 通过改进的替代状态构造和QR分解技术，成功开发了针对连续时间LQR问题的有效无模型迭代算法，解决了现有方法的局限性，并为连续时间系统的轨迹生成提供了启发式结果。

Abstract: This paper proposes efficient policy iteration and value iteration algorithms for the continuous-time linear quadratic regulator problem with unmeasurable states and unknown system dynamics, from the perspective of direct data-driven control. Specifically, by re-examining the data characteristics of input-output filtered vectors and introducing QR decomposition, an improved substitute state construction method is presented that further eliminates redundant information, ensures a full row rank data matrix, and enables a complete parameterized representation of the feedback controller. Furthermore, the original problem is transformed into an equivalent linear quadratic regulator problem defined on the substitute state with a known input matrix, verifying the stabilizability and detectability of the transformed system. Consequently, model-free policy iteration and value iteration algorithms are designed that fully exploit the full row rank substitute state data matrix. The proposed algorithms offer distinct advantages: they avoid the need for prior knowledge of the system order or the calculation of signal derivatives and integrals; the iterative equations can be solved directly without relying on the traditional least-squares paradigm, guaranteeing feasibility in both single-output and multi-output settings; and they demonstrate superior numerical stability, reduced data demand, and higher computational efficiency. Moreover, the heuristic results regarding trajectory generation for continuous-time systems are discussed, circumventing potential failure modes associated with existing approaches.

</details>


### [293] [Context-Aware Adaptive Shared Control for Magnetically-Driven Bimanual Dexterous Micromanipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14388)
*Yongchen Wang,Kangyi Lu,Lan Wei,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: Bi-CAST：用于双手机器人磁微操作的情境感知自适应共享控制框架，通过多模态网络和双向触觉界面实现动态人机权限协商，显著提升复杂血管环境中的导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 磁驱动机器人在受限环境中导航具有潜力，但在复杂结构中的灵巧操作仍然困难。双手机器人遥操作需要协调多个磁源，给操作者带来高认知负荷，需要解决非线性动力学和协调控制的挑战。

Method: 提出Bi-CAST框架：1）多模态网络融合时空视觉特征、空间风险度量和历史状态，实时调整每个机械臂的控制权限；2）双向触觉界面集成基于力的意图识别和风险感知引导，通过力反馈实现动态人机权限协商。

Result: 在8名参与者进行的血管模型三种复杂度导航任务中，相比固定权限和离散切换基线，Bi-CAST实现：碰撞减少76.6%，轨迹平滑度提升25.9%，NASA-TLX工作负荷降低44.4%，同时任务完成时间最快。

Conclusion: Bi-CAST通过情境感知自适应共享控制有效解决了双手机器人磁微操作中的协调挑战，显著提升了复杂环境中的导航性能并降低了操作者认知负荷，为微创医疗应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Magnetically actuated robots provide a promising untethered platform for navigation in confined environments, enabling biological studies and targeted micro-delivery. However, dexterous manipulation in complex structures remains challenging. While single-arm magnetic actuation suffices for simple transport, steering through tortuous or bifurcating channels demands coordinated control of multiple magnetic sources to generate the torques required for precise rotation and directional guidance. Bimanual teleoperation enables such dexterous steering but imposes high cognitive demands, as operators must handle the nonlinear dynamics of magnetic actuation while coordinating two robotic manipulators. To address these limitations, we propose Bi-CAST, a context-aware adaptive shared control framework for bimanual magnetic micromanipulation. A multimodal network fuses spatio-temporal visual features, spatial risk metrics, and historical states to continuously adjust the control authority of each manipulator in real time. In parallel, a bidirectional haptic interface integrates force-based intent recognition with risk-aware guidance, enabling force feedback to provide a continuous channel for dynamic human-machine authority negotiation. We validate the framework through user studies with eight participants performing three navigation tasks of increasing complexity in a vascular phantom. Compared with fixed authority and discrete switching baselines, Bi-CAST achieves up to 76.6% reduction in collisions, 25.9% improvement in trajectory smoothness, and 44.4% lower NASA-TLX workload, while delivering the fastest task completion times.

</details>


### [294] [DexterousMag: A Reconfigurable Electromagnetic Actuation System for Miniature Helical Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14396)
*Jialin Lin,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: DexterousMag：一种机器人辅助的三线圈电磁驱动系统，通过连续几何重构实现任务自适应操作，扩大微型螺旋机器人的实际工作范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前电磁驱动系统空间效率低且几何固定，限制了临床转化，无法实现工作空间覆盖、能量分布和场/梯度能力之间的任务自适应权衡。

Method: 采用机器人辅助的三线圈电磁驱动系统，通过并联机构实现线圈组的连续几何重构（单自由度极角参数化），结合FEM建模管道预计算驱动和梯度库。

Result: 系统验证了深度可达配置扩展可行区域但降低峰值场/梯度，近表面配置集中更强场/梯度并支持提升；在代表性任务中验证了权衡，并展示了在线几何调度方案。

Conclusion: DexterousMag建立了连续几何重构作为操作机制，扩大了微型螺旋机器人驱动的实际工作范围，同时提高了能量效率和安全性。

Abstract: Despite the promise of magnetically actuated miniature helical robots for minimally invasive interventions, state-of-the-art electromagnetic actuation systems are often space-inefficient and geometrically fixed. These constraints hinder clinical translation and, moreover, prevent task-adaptive trade-offs among workspace coverage, energy distribution, and field/gradient capability. We present DexterousMag, a robot-arm-assisted three-coil electromagnetic actuation system that enables continuous geometric reconfiguration of a compact coil group, thereby redistributing magnetic-field and gradient capability for task-adaptive operation. The reconfiguration is realized by a parallel mechanism that exposes a single geometric DOF of the coil group, conveniently parameterized by the polar angle. Using an FEM-based modeling pipeline, we precompute actuation and gradient libraries and quantify the resulting trade-offs under current limits: configurations that favor depth reach expand the feasible region but reduce peak field/gradient, whereas configurations that favor near-surface capability concentrate stronger fields/gradients and support lifting. We validate these trade-offs on representative tasks (deep translation, planar tracking, and 3D lifting) and further demonstrate a proof-of-concept online geometry scheduling scheme for combined tasks, benchmarked against fixed-geometry settings. Overall, DexterousMag establishes continuous geometric reconfiguration as an operational mechanism for enlarging the practical envelope of miniature helical robot actuation while improving energy efficiency and safety.

</details>


### [295] [Robust Safety Filters for Lipschitz-Bounded Adaptive Closed-Loop Systems with Structured Uncertainties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14403)
*Johannes Autenrieb,Peter A. Fisher,Anuradha Annaswamy*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于参考的自适应安全框架，结合自适应控制与CBF安全滤波器，通过SOCP优化减少保守性，保证安全性和跟踪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自适应控制能保证稳定性和参考跟踪，但无法确保状态约束的安全性，特别是在自适应瞬态阶段。现有CBF安全滤波器方法通常依赖保守的约束收紧或静态安全裕度。

Method: 提出参考级自适应安全框架：1) 在参考层面使用基于屏障函数的安全滤波器保证安全；2) 自适应控制驱动实际系统跟踪安全认证的参考；3) 利用闭环误差动态的Lipschitz界推导鲁棒CBF条件；4) 将问题重构为凸二阶锥规划(SOCP)。

Result: 该方法减少了保守性，同时保持了前向不变性、稳定性和跟踪的形式化保证。

Conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了具有结构化参数不确定性的系统的安全控制问题，在自适应瞬态阶段也能保证安全性，通过SOCP优化实现了保守性与性能的平衡。

Abstract: Adaptive control provides closed-loop stability and reference tracking for uncertain dynamical systems through online parameter adaptation. These properties alone, however, do not ensure safety in the sense of forward invariance of state constraints, particularly during transient phases of adaptation. Control barrier function (CBF)-based safety filters have been proposed to address this limitation, but existing approaches often rely on conservative constraint tightening or static safety margins within quadratic program formulations. This paper proposes a reference-based adaptive safety framework for systems with structured parametric uncertainty that explicitly accounts for transient plant-reference mismatch. Safety is enforced at the reference level using a barrier-function-based filter, while adaptive control drives the plant to track the safety-certified reference. By exploiting Lipschitz bounds on the closed-loop error dynamics, a robust CBF condition is derived and reformulated as a convex second-order cone program (SOCP). The resulting approach reduces conservatism while preserving formal guarantees of forward invariance, stability, and tracking.

</details>


### [296] [DRCC-LPVMPC: Robust Data-Driven Control for Autonomous Driving and Obstacle Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14408)
*Shiming Fang,Xilin Li,Changzhi Wu,Kaiyan Yu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种分布鲁棒机会约束线性参数变化MPC框架，用于处理自动驾驶避障中的模型失配问题，通过Wasserstein模糊集处理未知分布的不确定性，实现更安全的障碍物避让。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶避障的安全性至关重要。传统MPC使用的简化预测模型（如线性化或单轨车辆模型）会导致预测与实际行为之间的差异，可能危及安全。需要一种能够明确处理这种模型失配的方法。

Method: 提出分布鲁棒机会约束线性参数变化MPC（DRCC-LPVMPC）框架：1）将单轨车辆动力学表示为拟线性参数变化形式；2）将模型失配视为未知分布的加性不确定性；3）基于有限采样数据构建机会约束；4）使用Wasserstein模糊集避免对边界性或高斯分布的严格假设；5）将DRCC问题重新表述为可处理的凸约束；6）使用二次规划求解器实时求解。

Result: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，DRCC-LPVMPC在显著不确定性下比传统非线性MPC和LPVMPC控制器保持更安全的障碍物间隙和更可靠的跟踪性能。同时，方法的递归可行性得到了形式化证明。

Conclusion: DRCC-LPVMPC框架有效解决了自动驾驶避障中模型失配带来的安全问题，通过分布鲁棒机会约束方法处理未知分布的不确定性，实现了更安全可靠的避障控制，且具有递归可行性保证。

Abstract: Safety in obstacle avoidance is critical for autonomous driving. While model predictive control (MPC) is widely used, simplified prediction models such as linearized or single-track vehicle models introduce discrepancies between predicted and actual behavior that can compromise safety. This paper proposes a distributionally robust chance-constrained linear parameter-varying MPC (DRCC-LPVMPC) framework that explicitly accounts for such discrepancies. The single-track vehicle dynamics are represented in a quasi-linear parameter-varying (quasi-LPV) form, with model mismatches treated as additive uncertainties of unknown distribution. By constructing chance constraints from finite sampled data and employing a Wasserstein ambiguity set, the proposed method avoids restrictive assumptions on boundedness or Gaussian distributions. The resulting DRCC problem is reformulated as tractable convex constraints and solved in real time using a quadratic programming solver. Recursive feasibility of the approach is formally established. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that DRCC-LPVMPC maintains safer obstacle clearance and more reliable tracking than conventional nonlinear MPC and LPVMPC controllers under significant uncertainties.

</details>


### [297] [A Comprehensive Survey of Redundancy Systems with a Focus on Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14411)
*Lukas Flad,Mark Leyer,Felix Sebastian Nitz,Tobias Krawutschke*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文是一篇关于容错冗余技术的综述，主要聚焦三模冗余(TMR)，建立了统一分类法，分析了不同冗余策略的权衡，并指出了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 容错冗余领域存在严重的术语碎片化问题，功能相同的方法在不同学术和工业领域经常使用不同名称描述，这造成了混淆和沟通障碍。

Method: 建立统一分类法将冗余策略分为空间、时间和混合三类，并提出了新颖的五类投票器架构框架，对TMR技术进行结构化综合分析。

Result: 分析了不同冗余策略的实际权衡：安全关键应用适合高可靠性的空间TMR，资源受限系统适合资源高效的时间方法；探索了混合和自适应TMR在动态和容错应用中的发展趋势。

Conclusion: 识别了关键研究空白：28nm以下技术的多位翻转威胁、专有高完整性系统公开数据稀缺、动态重配置高级工具链缺失；建议未来研究方向包括术语标准化、MBU弹性设计方法和自适应容错开源工具开发。

Abstract: Despite its maturity, the field of fault-tolerant redundancy suffers from significant terminological fragmentation, where functionally equivalent methods are frequently described under disparate names across academic and industrial domains. This survey addresses this ambiguity by providing a structured and comprehensive analysis of redundancy techniques, with a primary focus on Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR). A unified taxonomy is established to classify redundancy strategies into Spatial, Temporal, and Mixed categories, alongside the introduction of a novel five-class framework for voter architectures. Key findings synthesize practical tradeoffs, contrasting high-reliability spatial TMR for safety-critical applications against resource-efficient temporal methods for constrained systems. Furthermore, the shift toward Mixed and Adaptive TMR (e.g., Approximate Triple Modular Redundancy (ATMR), X-Rel) for dynamic and error-tolerant applications, such as Artificial Intelligence (AI) acceleration, is explored. This work identifies critical research gaps, including the threat of Multi-Bit Upsets (MBUs) in sub-28nm technologies, the scarcity of public-domain data on proprietary high-integrity systems, and the absence of high-level toolchains for dynamic reconfiguration. Finally, suggestions are offered for future research directions, emphasizing the need for terminological standardization, MBU-resilient design methodologies, and the development of open-source tools for adaptive fault tolerance.

</details>


### [298] [Predicting power grid frequency dynamics with invertible Koopman-based architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14442)
*Eric Lupascu,Xiao Li,Benjamin Schäfer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究分析不同可逆神经网络架构在电力系统频率动态建模中的应用，发现耦合层INN单独使用时性能最佳，混合方法结合合适的INN可提升性能但需注意架构选择对泛化能力的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力系统频率是稳定性的关键指标，Koopman自编码器能近似复杂非线性模式但不可逆性会导致潜在表示失真和预测误差，需要可逆神经网络结合Koopman框架来解决这些限制。

Method: 分析不同INN架构并在仿真数据集上训练，应用扩展方法解决INN固有局限性，评估耦合层INN单独使用性能，探索混合方法结合不同INN架构的效果。

Result: 耦合层INN单独使用时性能最佳；混合方法结合合适的INN可提升性能，但结合不利架构会降低泛化能力；不同架构选择显著影响INN性能。

Conclusion: 研究结果为电力系统频率动态建模中INN的选择和设计提供了清晰指导，强调了架构选择对性能的重要影响，为可靠电力系统运行提供了方法学支持。

Abstract: The system frequency is a critical measure of power system stability and understanding, and modeling it are key to ensure reliable power system operations. Koopman-based autoencoders are effective at approximating complex nonlinear data patterns, with potential applications in the frequency dynamics of power systems. However, their non-invertibility can result in a distorted latent representation, leading to significant prediction errors. Invertible neural networks (INNs) in combination with the Koopman operator framework provide a promising approach to address these limitations. In this study, we analyze different INN architectures and train them on simulation datasets. We further apply extensions to the networks to address inherent limitations of INNs and evaluate their impact. We find that coupling-layer INNs achieve the best performance when used in isolation. In addition, we demonstrate that hybrid approaches can improve the performance when combined with suitable INNs, while reducing the generalization capabilities in combination with disadvantageous architectures. Overall, our results provide a clearer overview of how architectural choices influence INN performance, offering guidance for selecting and designing INNs for modeling power system frequency dynamics.

</details>


### [299] [Surgi-HDTMR: Closing the Sensorimotor Loop in Bimanual Microsurgery via Haptics, Digital Twin, and Mixed Reality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14450)
*Songming Ping,Shaoyue Wen,Junhong Chen,Wen Fan,Lan Wei,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: Surgi-HDTMR：一种结合混合现实、数字孪生和深度自适应触觉反馈的机器人显微外科训练系统，能缩短任务时间、减少有害接触并提高感知准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人显微外科需要精确的双臂控制、直观交互和丰富的力反馈，但现有训练平台大多缺乏沉浸式3D交互和高保真触觉反馈。

Method: 开发了Surgi-HDTMR系统，将双臂触觉遥操作与台式显微外科机器人平台、3D打印模型相结合。通过度量配准、时间同步的数字孪生对齐现场MR引导与物理工作空间，并驱动深度自适应触觉模型来渲染接触、穿刺和组织牵拉力。

Result: 在模拟皮质导航和肿瘤切除的受试者内研究中，相比无触觉和非自适应基线，Surgi-HDTMR缩短了任务时间，减少了有害接触和碰撞，提高了感知准确性。

Conclusion: 将MR叠加与同步数字孪生紧密耦合，结合深度自适应触觉技术，可以加速机器人辅助显微外科的技能获取并提高安全性，指向下一代外科训练的发展方向。

Abstract: Robotic microsurgery demands precise bimanual control, intuitive interaction, and informative force feedback. However, most training platforms for robotic microsurgery lack immersive 3D interaction and high-fidelity haptics. Here, we present Surgi-HDTMR, a mixed-reality (MR) and digital-twin (DT) training system that couples bimanual haptic teleoperation with a benchtop microsurgical robotic platform, and 3D-printed phantoms. A metrically co-registered, time-synchronized DT aligns in-situ MR guidance with the physical workspace and drives a depth-adaptive haptic model that renders contact, puncture, and tissue-retraction forces. In a within-subjects study of simulated cortical navigation and tumor resection, Surgi-HDTMR shortened task time, reduced harmful contacts and collisions, and improved perceptual accuracy relative to non-haptic and non-adaptive baselines. These results suggest that tightly coupling MR overlays with a synchronized DT, together with depth-adaptive haptics, can accelerate skill acquisition and improve safety in robot-assisted microsurgery, pointing toward next-generation surgical training.

</details>


### [300] [Bayesian and Classical Feature Ranking for Interpretable BLDC Fault Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14509)
*Waldemar Bauer,Jerzy Baranowski*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 比较贝叶斯与经典特征排序方法在无刷直流电机故障诊断中的性能，发现贝叶斯方法在小特征子集上表现优异，而ReliefF在速度特征上效果最好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究贝叶斯和经典特征排序方法在无刷直流电机故障诊断中的性能差异，为可解释性故障诊断提供方法比较。

Method: 使用两种贝叶斯方法（spike-and-slab和ARD logistic）和三种经典基线方法（包括ReliefF和LASSO），在公开BLDC基准数据集上进行二分类和多分类实验，评估基于电流、转速和组合特征集的性能。

Result: 组合特征集表现最佳。二分类中ReliefF平衡准确率最高（0.923），但贝叶斯方法在k=5小特征子集上接近（0.919-0.920）。多分类中ARD logistic最佳（0.914），LASSO（0.913）和spike-and-slab（0.912）紧随其后。贝叶斯方法在电流和组合特征上特别有竞争力，ReliefF在速度特征上效果最好。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯特征排序方法在无刷直流电机故障诊断中具有竞争力，特别是在小特征子集上表现优异，但研究结果主要针对特定基准数据集，不能作为故障泛化的强有力主张。

Abstract: This paper compares Bayesian and classical feature ranking methods for interpretable fault diagnosis of brushless DC (BLDC) motors. Two Bayesian approaches, spike-and-slab and ARD logistic ranking, are evaluated against three classical baselines on a public BLDC benchmark in binary and multiclass settings using current-based, rotational-speed-based, and combined feature sets. The strongest overall results are obtained for the combined representation. In binary classification, ReliefF achieves the highest balanced accuracy of 0.923, while ARD logistic and spike-and-slab remain very close at 0.919 and 0.920 with much smaller subsets ($k=5$). In multiclass classification, ARD logistic performs best for the combined variant with balanced accuracy 0.914, followed closely by LASSO (0.913) and spike-and-slab (0.912). The results show that Bayesian ranking is particularly competitive for current-only and combined descriptors, while ReliefF remains especially effective for speed-based ranking. Because the benchmark consists of short segmented observations from a limited number of experimental conditions, the findings are interpreted primarily as benchmark-specific evidence rather than strong claims of fault generalization.

</details>


### [301] [Consensus in Plug-and-Play Heterogeneous Dynamical Networks: A Passivity Compensation Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14516)
*Yongkang Su,Sei Zhen Khong,Lanlan Su*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究异构动态网络在即插即用框架下的输出一致性问题，提出利用耦合链路的过剩无源性补偿节点无源性不足的方法，建立局部可验证的接口条件来保证网络扩展时的共识特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在存在测量和通信噪声的异构动态网络中实现输出共识的问题，特别是在即插即用框架下，需要解决网络扩展时如何保持共识特性而不需要全局重新分析。

Method: 提出无源性补偿方法，利用非线性扩散耦合链路的过剩无源性来局部补偿节点的无源性不足。推导出基于无源性指数和耦合增益的局部可验证接口条件，确保子网络互联时共识特性得以保持。

Result: 建立了保证网络扩展时共识特性保持的局部验证条件，使得子网络可以即插即用地互联而不需要全局重新分析，从而保持了系统的模块化特性。

Conclusion: 通过无源性补偿方法和局部接口条件，成功解决了异构动态网络在即插即用框架下的输出共识问题，为大规模网络系统的模块化设计和扩展提供了理论支持。

Abstract: This paper investigates output consensus in heterogeneous dynamical networks within a plug-and-play framework. The networks are interconnected through nonlinear diffusive couplings and operate in the presence of measurement and communication noise. Focusing on systems that are input feedforward passive (IFP), we propose a passivity-compensation approach that exploits the surplus passivity of coupling links to locally offset shortages of passivity at the nodes. This mechanism enables subnetworks to be interconnected without requiring global reanalysis, thereby preserving modularity. Specifically, we derive locally verifiable interface conditions, expressed in terms of passivity indices and coupling gains, to guarantee that consensus properties of individual subnetworks are preserved when forming larger networks.

</details>


### [302] [Collective Grid: Privacy-Preserved Multi-Operator Energy Sharing Optimization via Federated Energy Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14606)
*Meysam Masoudi,Tahar Zanouda,Milad Ganjalizadeh,Cicek Cavdar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一个隐私保护的自动化能源基础设施共享框架，用于共址移动网络运营商之间，通过联邦学习预测能耗、优化调度能源采购和共享电池使用，显著降低运营成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着5G扩展、数据流量增长和基础设施复杂化，移动网络电力消耗不断增加。当前各移动网络运营商独立管理能源，缺乏协调，错失了集体效率提升的机会。

Method: 框架包含三个模块：1) 基于联邦学习的隐私保护站点能耗预测模块；2) 编排模块，通过混合整数线性规划调度电网能源采购、可再生能源利用、共享电池充放电；3) 能源选择模块，根据预测需求选择成本效益高的电源和存储操作。

Result: 使用实际运营网络数据进行实验，证实该方案能显著降低运营成本，优于非共享基准方案，且随着5G及后续网络密度增加，收益会进一步扩大。

Conclusion: 提出的隐私保护能源基础设施共享框架为共址移动网络运营商提供了有效的集体能源管理方案，在保护数据隐私的同时实现了显著的运营成本节约。

Abstract: Electricity consumption in mobile networks is increasing with the continued 5G expansion, rising data traffic, and more complex infrastructures. However, energy management is often handled independently by each mobile network operator (MNO), leading to limited coordination and missed opportunities for collective efficiency gains. To address this gap, we propose a privacy-preserving framework for automated energy infrastructure sharing among co-located MNOs. Our framework consists of three modules: (i) a federated learning-based privacy-preserving site energy consumption forecasting module, (ii) an orchestration module in which a mixed-integer linear program is solved to schedule energy purchases from the grid, utilization of renewable sources, and shared battery charging or discharging, based on real-time prices, forecasts, and battery state, and (iii) an energy source selection module which handles the selection of cost-effective power sources and storage actions based on predicted demand across MNOs for the next control window. Using data from operational networks, our experiments confirm that the proposed solution substantially reduces operational costs and outperforms non-sharing baselines, with gains that increase as network density rises in 5G-and-beyond deployments.

</details>


### [303] [Progress-Based Fault Detection and Health-Aware Task Allocation for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14622)
*Jack Cline,Christian Macaranas,Siavash Farzan*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于进度的故障检测模块，结合动态任务分配用于异构机器人团队，通过轻量级卡尔曼滤波和NIS测试检测故障，使用健康加权成本和掩码影响分配器，实验验证了在噪声、偏差、通信中断等场景下的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异构机器人团队在复杂环境中执行任务时，机器人可能因各种原因发生故障，需要及时检测并重新分配任务以维持团队整体性能。现有方法在故障检测与动态任务分配的集成方面存在不足，特别是在保持计算效率和限制重新分配频率方面。

Method: 1. 故障检测模块：监控归一化的任务完成信号，使用轻量级卡尔曼滤波器(KF)和归一化创新平方(NIS)测试，辅以低速停滞门、不确定性门和去抖逻辑
2. 动态任务分配：健康估计通过健康加权成本和健康相关掩码影响分配器，重新分配采用事件触发机制，并引入ℓ₁分配变化惩罚来限制重新分配波动，通过松弛变量保持可行性
3. 系统特性：检测器具有恒定的每机器人更新成本，分配问题保持为凸二次规划(QP)

Result: 在常见团队任务设置上的实验评估了测量噪声增加、速度滑移偏差、通信中断和任务放弃等情况。结果显示：在噪声和偏差情况下能够及时检测故障；通过有限重新分配维持任务完成；在通信中断情况下出现预期的可观测性延迟。

Conclusion: 提出的集成故障检测与动态任务分配系统能够有效处理异构机器人团队中的故障情况，在保持计算效率的同时实现及时故障检测和合理的任务重新分配，提高了团队在故障情况下的鲁棒性和任务完成能力。

Abstract: We present a progress-based fault detection module and its integration with dynamic task allocation for heterogeneous robot teams. The detector monitors a normalized task-completion signal with a lightweight Kalman filter (KF) and a normalized innovation squared (NIS) test, augmented with a low-rate stall gate, an uncertainty gate, and debounce logic. Health estimates influence the allocator via health-weighted costs and health-dependent masks; reallocation is event-triggered and regularized with an $\ell_1$ assignment-change penalty to limit reassignment churn while preserving feasibility through slack variables. The detector has constant per-robot update cost, and the allocation remains a convex quadratic program (QP). Experiments on a common team-task setup evaluate measurement-noise increases, velocity-slip biases, communication dropouts, and task abandonment. The results show timely detection in the noise and bias cases, maintained task completion with limited reassignment, and the expected observability delays under communication dropouts.

</details>


### [304] [Transformers As Generalizable Optimal Controllers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14910)
*Turki Bin Mohaya,Maitham F. AL-Sunni,John M. Dolan,Peter Seiler*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 训练单一Transformer策略学习多种MIMO LTI系统的最优状态反馈控制，无需系统矩阵即可实现接近LQR的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究是否能用单一学习控制器捕捉多种异构MIMO LTI系统的最优状态反馈规律，实现通用控制策略

Method: 使用Transformer策略在LQR生成轨迹上训练，采用共享表示、标准化、填充、维度编码和掩码损失等技术处理不同维度系统

Result: 策略在多种系统上实现接近LQR的次优性能，在适度参数扰动下保持稳定，对未见系统可通过轻量微调获得良好效果

Conclusion: Transformer策略可作为结构化线性系统家族中近最优反馈规律的实际近似器，具有实用价值

Abstract: We study whether optimal state-feedback laws for a family of heterogeneous Multiple-Input, Multiple-Output (MIMO) Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) systems can be captured by a single learned controller. We train one transformer policy on LQR-generated trajectories from systems with different state and input dimensions, using a shared representation with standardization, padding, dimension encoding, and masked loss. The policy maps recent state history to control actions without requiring plant matrices at inference time. Across a broad set of systems, it achieves empirically small sub-optimality relative to Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR), remains stabilizing under moderate parameter perturbations, and benefits from lightweight fine-tuning on unseen systems. These results support transformer policies as practical approximators of near-optimal feedback laws over structured linear-system families.

</details>


### [305] [Intelligent Control of Differential Drive Robots Subject to Unmodeled Dynamics with EKF-based State Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14940)
*Amos Alwala,Yuchen Hu,Gabriel da Silva Lima,Wallace Moreira Bessa*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出结合自适应神经网络与扩展卡尔曼滤波的差速驱动机器人控制与状态估计统一框架，提升动态不确定环境下的轨迹跟踪性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 差速驱动机器人在动态不确定环境中运行时，系统动力学部分未知且传感器测量容易退化，可靠的控制和状态估计仍具挑战性

Method: 结合Lyapunov非线性控制器、自适应神经网络（RBF架构）和EKF多传感器融合。神经网络实时建模未知非线性，在线更新权重，与反馈线性化控制结合；EKF融合IMU、单目相机、2D-LiDAR和编码器数据

Result: Gazebo仿真和真实实验显示，相比基线FBL方法，线性速度误差降低53.91%，角速度误差降低29.0%，轨迹跟踪性能显著提升

Conclusion: 提出的统一框架在存在漂移、轮滑、传感器噪声和故障的情况下，仍能确保差速驱动机器人的鲁棒控制和状态估计，具有实际应用价值

Abstract: Reliable control and state estimation of differential drive robots (DDR) operating in dynamic and uncertain environments remains a challenge, particularly when system dynamics are partially unknown and sensor measurements are prone to degradation. This work introduces a unified control and state estimation framework that combines a Lyapunov-based nonlinear controller and Adaptive Neural Networks (ANN) with Extended Kalman Filter (EKF)-based multi-sensor fusion. The proposed controller leverages the universal approximation property of neural networks to model unknown nonlinearities in real time. An online adaptation scheme updates the weights of the radial basis function (RBF), the architecture chosen for the ANN. The learned dynamics are integrated into a feedback linearization (FBL) control law, for which theoretical guarantees of closed-loop stability and asymptotic convergence in a trajectory-tracking task are established through a Lyapunov-like stability analysis. To ensure robust state estimation, the EKF fuses inertial measurement unit (IMU) and odometry from monocular, 2D-LiDAR and wheel encoders. The fused state estimate drives the intelligent controller, ensuring consistent performance even under drift, wheel slip, sensor noise and failure. Gazebo simulations and real-world experiments are done using DDR, demonstrating the effectiveness of the approach in terms of improved velocity tracking performance with reduction in linear and angular velocity errors up to $53.91\%$ and $29.0\%$ in comparison to the baseline FBL.

</details>


### [306] [A System-Theoretic Approach to Hawkes Process Identification with Guaranteed Positivity and Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14942)
*Xinhui Rong,Girish N. Nair*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于符号不定正交拉盖尔基的系统理论识别框架，用于霍克斯过程参数估计，通过半定规划高效求解约束最小二乘问题，保证正定性和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统霍克斯过程识别方法使用非负因果基，导致保守参数约束和高阶模型下严重病态的Gram矩阵，需要更优的识别框架。

Method: 使用符号不定的正交拉盖尔基构建系统理论识别框架，通过Lyapunov方程构建经验Gram矩阵，将约束表示为平方和迹等价，用半定规划求解约束最小二乘问题。

Result: 提出的方法保证Gram矩阵的良好条件性且与模型阶数无关，能高效计算满足正定性和稳定性必要充分条件的估计器。

Conclusion: 该框架克服了传统方法的局限性，为霍克斯过程识别提供了更优的系统理论方法，通过半定规划实现高效计算。

Abstract: The Hawkes process models self-exciting event streams, requiring a strictly non-negative and stable stochastic intensity. Standard identification methods enforce these properties using non-negative causal bases, yielding conservative parameter constraints and severely ill-conditioned least-squares Gram matrices at higher model orders. To overcome this, we introduce a system-theoretic identification framework utilizing the sign-indefinite orthonormal Laguerre basis, which guarantees a well-conditioned asymptotic Gram matrix independent of model order. We formulate a constrained least-squares problem enforcing the necessary and sufficient conditions for positivity and stability. By constructing the empirical Gram matrix via a Lyapunov equation and representing the constraints through a sum-of-squares trace equivalence, the proposed estimator is efficiently computed via semidefinite programming.

</details>


### [307] [Chattering Reduction for a Second-Order Actuator via Dynamic Sliding Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14990)
*Patricia Nöther,Lars Watermann,Johann Reger*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究二阶执行器动力学下的滑模控制抖振问题，通过动态滑模面设计降低抖振幅值


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 滑模控制在存在不确定性和扰动时具有鲁棒性，但执行器动力学会导致抖振现象。传统静态滑模面难以有效抑制抖振，需要研究动态滑模面设计来降低抖振幅值。

Method: 针对带有未知时间常数的二阶执行器动力学和一阶滑模控制的标量积分器系统，采用谐波平衡法分析执行器抖振。比较传统静态滑模面和动态滑模面，通过调整动态滑模面参数来降低抖振幅值。

Result: 证明可以通过调整动态滑模面参数来降低抖振幅值，相比静态滑模面有更好的抖振抑制效果。通过实例验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 动态滑模面设计能有效降低执行器抖振幅值，为滑模控制在实际系统中的抖振抑制提供了理论依据和实用方法。

Abstract: We analyze actuator chattering in a scalar integrator system subject to second-order actuator dynamics with an unknown time constant and first-order sliding-mode control, using both a conventional static sliding manifold and a dynamic sliding manifold. Using the harmonic balance method we proof that it is possible to adjust the parameters of the dynamic sliding manifold so as to reduce the amplitude of the chattering in comparison to the static manifold. The proof of concept is illustrated with an example.

</details>


### [308] [Data-Driven Robust Predictive Control with Interval Matrix Uncertainty Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15063)
*Renato Quartullo,Andrea Garulli,Mirko Leomanni*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于数据驱动的鲁棒预测控制方法，利用区间矩阵和矩阵zonotopes处理有界扰动，保证约束满足和稳定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对受未知但有界过程扰动影响的线性系统，传统模型预测控制需要精确模型，而数据驱动方法能直接从数据构建不确定性表示，避免系统辨识的复杂性

Method: 使用输入-状态数据序列构建基于区间矩阵的不确定性表示，通过矩阵zonotopes算子限制预测时域内的不确定性影响，形成鲁棒管，在变时域最优控制问题中保证约束满足

Result: 提出的数据驱动预测控制方案具有递归可行性和实际稳定性，数值实验表明其优于基于zonotopic管的现有方法，与结合集合成员系统辨识和模型预测控制的方法相当

Conclusion: 成功开发了一种数据驱动的鲁棒预测控制框架，直接从数据构建不确定性表示，无需系统辨识，在保证鲁棒性的同时具有良好性能

Abstract: This paper presents a new data-driven robust predictive control law, for linear systems affected by unknown-but-bounded process disturbances. A sequence of input-state data is used to construct a suitable uncertainty representation based on interval matrices. Then, the effect of uncertainty along the prediction horizon is bounded through an operator leveraging matrix zonotopes. This yields a tube that is exploited within a variable-horizon optimal control problem, to guarantee robust satisfaction of state and input constraints. The resulting data-driven predictive control scheme is shown to be recursively feasible and practically stable.
