A numerical example shows that the proposed approach compares favorably to existing methods based on zonotopic tubes and is competitive with an approach combining set-membership system identification and model-based predictive control.

</details>


### [309] [Multi-Scale Control of Large Agent Populations: From Density Dynamics to Individual Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15160)
*Mario di Bernardo*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了作者及其合作者在多尺度控制大规模智能体群体空间组织方面的研究，通过桥接微观智能体动力学与宏观密度描述，为直接控制和间接控制提供了统一框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于解决大规模智能体群体控制的挑战，特别是如何系统性地桥接微观智能体层面的动力学与宏观密度描述，使得控制设计能够在最自然的抽象层面上进行，并实现跨尺度的转换。

Method: 采用多尺度控制框架，包括：连续化控制方法（具有有限感知下的鲁棒性和分布式密度估计的分散实现）、领导者-跟随者密度调节（具有双重反馈稳定性保证和生物启发的可塑性）、最优传输方法（用于覆盖控制和宏观到微观的离散化）、非互易场理论（用于集体决策）、均值场控制屏障函数（用于群体级安全）、以及分层强化学习（用于闭式解难以处理的场景）。

Result: 展示了多尺度视角如何为直接控制（每个智能体都被驱动）和间接控制（少数领导者或牧羊人引导更大的未控制群体）提供统一方法，证明了该框架在整合分析方法、学习和物理启发方法方面的广度和多功能性。

Conclusion: 多尺度控制框架通过整合分析方法、学习和物理启发方法，为大规模智能体群体控制提供了强大而通用的解决方案，能够处理从直接控制到间接控制的各种场景，并保证稳定性和安全性。

Abstract: We review a body of recent work by the author and collaborators on controlling the spatial organisation of large agent populations across multiple scales. A central theme is the systematic bridging of microscopic agent-level dynamics and macroscopic density descriptions, enabling control design at the most natural level of abstraction and subsequent translation across scales. We show how this multi-scale perspective provides a unified approach to both \emph{direct control}, where every agent is actuated, and \emph{indirect control}, where few leaders or herders steer a larger uncontrolled population. The review covers continuification-based control with robustness under limited sensing and decentralised implementation via distributed density estimation; leader--follower density regulation with dual-feedback stability guarantees and bio-inspired plasticity; optimal-transport methods for coverage control and macro-to-micro discretisation; nonreciprocal field theory for collective decision-making; mean-field control barrier functions for population-level safety; and hierarchical reinforcement learning for settings where closed-form solutions are intractable. Together, these results demonstrate the breadth and versatility of a multi-scale control framework that integrates analytical methods, learning, and physics-inspired approaches for large agent populations.

</details>


### [310] [Iterative Learning Control-Informed Reinforcement Learning for Batch Process Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15180)
*Runze Lin,Ziqi Zhuo,Junghui Chen,Lei Xie,Hongye Su*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出IL-CIRL框架，将迭代学习控制与深度强化学习结合，为批处理过程提供具有稳定性保证的双层控制架构


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在工业过程控制中存在随机不确定性风险，缺乏形式化的稳定性和收敛性保证，限制了实际应用。而迭代学习控制是批处理优化的成熟方法，能够通过迭代优化补偿重复和非重复扰动。

Method: 提出迭代学习控制引导的强化学习框架，结合卡尔曼滤波状态估计，在双层架构（批间和批内控制）中训练DRL控制器，确保满足操作约束和稳定性要求。

Result: 该方法能够系统设计适用于多种扰动条件下的批处理过程DRL控制器，提供稳定性保证，解决DRL在工业控制中的安全风险问题。

Conclusion: IL-CIRL框架成功将迭代学习控制的稳定性优势与深度强化学习的自适应能力结合，为批处理过程的智能控制提供了安全可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: A significant limitation of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is the stochastic uncertainty in actions generated during exploration-exploitation, which poses substantial safety risks during both training and deployment. In industrial process control, the lack of formal stability and convergence guarantees further inhibits adoption of DRL methods by practitioners. Conversely, Iterative Learning Control (ILC) represents a well-established autonomous control methodology for repetitive systems, particularly in batch process optimization. ILC achieves desired control performance through iterative refinement of control laws, either between consecutive batches or within individual batches, to compensate for both repetitive and non-repetitive disturbances. This study introduces an Iterative Learning Control-Informed Reinforcement Learning (IL-CIRL) framework for training DRL controllers in dual-layer batch-to-batch and within-batch control architectures for batch processes. The proposed method incorporates Kalman filter-based state estimation within the iterative learning structure to guide DRL agents toward control policies that satisfy operational constraints and ensure stability guarantees. This approach enables the systematic design of DRL controllers for batch processes operating under multiple disturbance conditions.

</details>


### [311] [Encirclement Guaranteed Finite-Time Capture against Unknown Evader Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15278)
*Dinesh Patra,Prajakta Surve,Ashish R. Hota,Shaunak D. Bopardikar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种在无界二维环境中，多追捕者包围并捕获单个逃逸者的策略，保证有限时间内捕获同时维持包围，无需知道逃逸者航向角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将包围和捕获问题分开处理，缺乏同时保证包围和有限时间捕获的统一策略。特别是在不知道逃逸者航向角的情况下，设计有效的追捕策略具有挑战性。

Method: 提出一类追捕者策略，确保在有限时间内捕获逃逸者，同时保持逃逸者始终处于追捕者位置的凸包内。策略不依赖于逃逸者的航向角信息，适用于任何逃逸策略。

Result: 证明了所提策略能保证有限时间内捕获逃逸者，并推导出捕获时间的上界。数值模拟显示该框架对多种逃逸策略都有效。

Conclusion: 成功开发了一种统一框架，同时解决包围和捕获问题，在不知道逃逸者航向角的情况下保证有限时间捕获，为多智能体追逃问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: We consider a pursuit-evasion scenario involving a group of pursuers and a single evader in a two-dimensional unbounded environment. The pursuers aim to capture the evader in finite time while ensuring the evader remains enclosed within the convex hull of their positions until capture, without knowledge of the evader's heading angle. Prior works have addressed the problem of encirclement and capture separately in different contexts. In this paper, we present a class of strategies for the pursuers that guarantee capture in finite time while maintaining encirclement, irrespective of the evader's strategy. Furthermore, we derive an upper bound on the time to capture. Numerical results highlight the effectiveness of the proposed framework against a range of evader strategies.

</details>


### [312] [ReLU Barrier Functions for Nonlinear Systems with Constrained Control: A Union of Invariant Sets Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15286)
*Pouya Samanipour,Hasan A. Poonawala*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种认证非线性系统安全性的近似-验证流程，使用分段仿射代理进行凸屏障合成，并通过分面验证为原始非线性系统提供安全认证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具有多面体输入约束的非线性系统的安全认证具有挑战性，因为CBF合成必须确保在饱和情况下的控制可采纳性

Method: 使用两斜率Leaky ReLU代理扩展类K函数α(·)，在分段仿射代理上进行凸屏障合成，通过分面验证为原始系统提供安全认证，采用不变集并集组合多个证书，通过局部不确定性更新处理反例

Result: 在具有输入饱和的摆和倒立摆系统上的仿真显示，相比线性α设计，获得了更大的认证不变集，且计算时间可处理

Conclusion: 提出的近似-验证流程能够在减少保守性的同时保持可处理性，为具有输入约束的非线性系统提供了有效的安全认证方法

Abstract: Certifying safety for nonlinear systems with polytopic input constraints is challenging because CBF synthesis must ensure control admissibility under saturation. We propose an approximation--verification pipeline that performs convex barrier synthesis on piecewise-affine (PWA) surrogates and certifies safety for the original nonlinear system via facet-wise verification. To reduce conservatism while preserving tractability, we use a two-slope Leaky ReLU surrogate for the extended class-$\mathcal{K}$ function $α(\cdot)$ and combine multiple certificates using a Union of Invariant Sets (UIS). Counterexamples are handled through local uncertainty updates. Simulations on pendulum and cart-pole systems with input saturation show larger certified invariant sets than linear-$α$ designs with tractable computation time.

</details>


### [313] [Matched Filter-Based Molecule Source Localization in Advection-Diffusion-Driven Pipe Networks with Known Topology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15394)
*Timo Jakumeit,Bastian Heinlein,Vukašin Spasojević,Vahid Jamali,Robert Schober,Maximilian Schäfer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出首个用于复杂管道网络中分子源定位的框架，利用MIGHT模型进行血流传输建模，采用匹配滤波器方法在未知释放时间、随机分子数量等现实条件下实现定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合成分子通信在管道网络（如心血管系统、污水网络）中具有重要应用价值，但现有算法主要关注简化场景，缺乏针对复杂管道网络拓扑的源定位框架。

Method: 利用MIGHT模型作为管道网络中平流扩散驱动分子通信的闭式表示，提出基于匹配滤波器的方法，处理未知释放时间、随机释放分子数量、传感器噪声和有限采样率等现实条件。

Result: 在真实污水网络中定位病毒标记源，即使在低信噪比下也优于随机猜测，在有利条件（高信噪比和高采样率）下实现无误差定位。通过识别经常混淆的源集群，可在显著降低的信噪比和采样率下实现可靠的集群级定位。

Conclusion: 该框架首次实现了复杂管道网络中的分子源定位，在现实条件下表现出色，为管道网络监测应用提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Synthetic molecular communication (MC) has emerged as a powerful framework for modeling, analyzing, and designing communication systems where information is encoded into properties of molecules. Among the envisioned applications of MC is the localization of molecule sources in pipe networks (PNs) like the human cardiovascular system (CVS), sewage networks (SNs), and industrial plants. While existing algorithms mostly focus on simplified scenarios, in this paper, we propose the first framework for source localization in complex PNs with known topology, by leveraging the mixture of inverse Gaussians for hemodynamic transport (MIGHT) model as a closed-form representation for advection-diffusion-driven MC in PNs. We propose a matched filter (MF)-based approach to identify molecule sources under realistic conditions such as unknown release times, random numbers of released molecules, sensor noise, and limited sensor sampling rate. We apply the algorithm to localize a source of viral markers in a real-world SN and show that the proposed scheme outperforms randomly guessing sources even at low signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) at the sensor and achieves error-free localization under favorable conditions, i.e., high SNRs and sampling rates. Furthermore, by identifying clusters of frequently confused sources, reliable cluster-level localization is possible at substantially lower SNRs and sampling rates.

</details>


### [314] [Spatial Characterization of Sub-Synchronous Oscillations Using Black-Box IBR Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15399)
*Muhammad Sharjeel Javaid,Gabriel Covarrubias Maureira,Ambuj Gupta,Debraj Bhattacharjee,Jianli Gao,Balarko Chaudhuri,Mark O'Malley*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用频域辨识技术估计黑盒IBR模型，结合动态网络模型来预测电力系统中次同步振荡的严重程度和传播范围，并通过模态分析和空间热图可视化SSO模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高比例逆变器资源（IBR）的电力系统容易发生次同步振荡（SSO），但厂商特定的IBR模型不透明，限制了预测SSO严重程度和传播范围的能力。

Method: 使用频域辨识技术估计黑盒IBR模型，结合动态网络模型；通过模态分析比较闭环特征值和参与因子来验证模型；利用输出可观测右特征向量开发空间热图可视化SSO模式。

Result: 在11总线和39总线测试系统上的案例研究表明，即使使用估计的IBR模型，也能在IBR主导的电力系统中识别出易受SSO影响的区域。

Conclusion: 通过频域辨识技术估计的黑盒IBR模型能够有效预测次同步振荡的严重程度和传播范围，为IBR主导的电力系统稳定性分析提供了实用方法。

Abstract: Power systems with high penetration of inverter-based resources (IBRs) are prone to sub-synchronous oscillations (SSO). The opaqueness of vendor-specific IBR models limits the ability to predict the severity and the spread of SSO. This paper demonstrates that black-box IBR models estimated through frequency-domain identification techniques, along with dynamic network model can replicate the actual oscillatory behavior. The estimated IBR models are validated against actual IBR models in a closed-loop multi-IBR test system through modal analysis by comparing closed-loop eigenvalues, and participation factors. Furthermore, using output-observable right eigenvectors, spatial heatmaps are developed to visualize the spread and severity of dominant SSO modes. The case studies on the 11-bus and 39-bus test systems confirm that even with the estimated IBR models, the regions susceptible to SSO can be identified in IBR-dominated power systems.

</details>


### [315] [Switching-Reference Voltage Control for Distribution Systems with AI-Training Data Centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15588)
*Mingyuan Yan,Trager Joswig-Jones,Baosen Zhang,Yize Chen,Wenqi Cu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种分散式切换参考电压控制框架，利用AI训练负载的结构化特性来应对数据中心快速功率波动引起的电压偏差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据中心的大规模AI训练负载表现出快速周期性功率波动，可能导致配电系统显著电压偏差。现有电压调节方法（如下垂控制）主要针对缓慢变化负载设计，对快速波动可能无效，且重复控制动作成本高昂。

Method: 提出分散式切换参考电压控制框架，利用AI训练负载的结构化行为。建立电压收敛条件，设计符合AI训练负载两个主要运行水平的有效参考值。切换规则仅使用本地电压测量实现，支持简单本地实施。

Result: 仿真研究表明，该方法显著减少了电压偏差和无功控制工作量，同时与数据中心内部控制策略兼容，无需大量协调。

Conclusion: 该分散式切换参考电压控制框架能有效应对AI训练负载引起的快速功率波动，减少电压偏差和控制成本，且易于实施和集成。

Abstract: Large-scale AI training workloads in modern data centers exhibit rapid and periodic power fluctuations, which may induce significant voltage deviations in power distribution systems. Existing voltage regulation methods, such as droop control, are primarily designed for slowly varying loads and may therefore be ineffective in mitigating these fast fluctuations. In addition, repeated control actions can incur substantial cost. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a decentralized switching-reference voltage control framework that exploits the structured behavior of AI training workloads. We establish conditions for voltage convergence and characterize an effective reference design that aligns with the two dominant operating levels of the AI training workload. The switching rule for voltage references is implemented solely using local voltage measurements, enabling simple local implementation while significantly reducing control effort. Simulation studies demonstrate that the proposed method substantially reduces both voltage deviations and reactive control effort, while remaining compatible with internal data center control strategies without requiring extensive coordination.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [316] [Beyond First-Order Methods for $\ell_p$-Structured Non-Monotone Variational Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13491)
*Abhijeet Vyas,Brian Bullins*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出针对ℓp-结构非单调变分不等式的高阶算法，解决了先前方法在弱Minty变分不等式(weak-MVI)参数ρ>0时无法收敛到ℓp-范数稳定点的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前Diakonikolas等人的工作只能处理ρ=0的标准MVI情况，对于ℓp-范数稳定点(p≠2)且ρ>0的弱MVI问题存在理论空白，需要新的算法来解决这一根本性挑战。

Method: 开发了一套高阶方法，能够收敛到ℓp-范数稳定点，适用于ρ>0的合适范围。同时将方法推广到高阶光滑单调算子(p≥2)，并将欧几里得技术扩展到连续时间设置。

Result: 成功解决了先前ℓp设置中的基本挑战，实现了在ρ>0时收敛到ℓp-范数稳定点，扩展了Adil等人的工作，并为连续时间设置提供了新方法。

Conclusion: 本文填补了ℓp-结构非单调变分不等式在弱MVI参数ρ>0时的理论空白，提供的高阶算法克服了先前方法的局限性，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

Abstract: We propose novel high-order algorithms for a class of $\ell_p$-structured non-monotone variational inequalities. In particular, work by Diakonikolas et al. (2021), which introduced the weak Minty variational inequality (weak-MVI) setting, showed how to find an approximate first-order Euclidean stationary point for a strictly positive range of the weak-MVI parameter $ρ$. However, for the $\ell_p$-norm stationary point setting ($p \neq 2$), their guarantees are limited to $ρ=0$, which recovers the standard MVI setting. In this work, we address this gap by presenting a suite of high-order methods that converge to $\ell_p$-norm stationary points for a suitable range of $ρ> 0$, thereby circumventing previous fundamental challenges in $\ell_p$ settings. We further show convergence for high-order smooth \textit{monotone} operators, generalizing Adil et al. (2022) to the case where $p \geq 2$, and we extend our Euclidean techniques to continuous-time settings.

</details>


### [317] [Machine Learning-Enabled Large-Scale Capacity Expansion Planning under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13508)
*Taehyeon Kwon,Anirudh Subramanyam*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: AutoSCEP自动选择最小足够场景数和运营时段长度，以给定精度估算生产成本，并训练替代模型嵌入规划中，在大规模系统上实现接近最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不确定性下的容量扩展规划需要在场景数量和代表性运营时段之间权衡：选择太少会导致不可靠的计划，选择太多则计算不可行。需要一种自动化、统计基础的方法来确定最小足够的参数。

Method: 提出AutoSCEP方法：1) 对于固定计划，自动选择最小足够的场景数和时段长度以估算生产成本到给定精度；2) 使用这些估计训练线性和神经网络替代模型来近似任意计划的期望生产成本；3) 将替代模型嵌入规划模型中。

Result: 在洲际规模的EMPIRE系统上：1) 简化模型达到2%的最优性差距；2) 大型模型达到8%的最优性差距；3) 在相同计算时间预算下优于并行渐进对冲算法；4) 简化模型的投资模式与基准基本一致。

Conclusion: AutoSCEP方法能够在现实系统规模下实现高分辨率不确定性建模，通过自动化参数选择和替代模型嵌入，有效平衡了计算可行性和规划可靠性。

Abstract: Capacity expansion planning under uncertainty requires selecting a scenario count and representative operational horizon to estimate average production costs. Small choices risk unreliable plans, while large choices become intractable. We propose AutoSCEP, an automated, statistically grounded procedure that, for a fixed plan, selects the minimum sufficient scenario count and horizon length to estimate production costs to a given precision. Using these estimates, we train linear and neural surrogates to approximate expected production costs for arbitrary plans, and embed the surrogates within the planning model. On the continental-scale EMPIRE system, AutoSCEP attains 2% optimality gap on a reduced model and 8% gap on a large model, outperforming parallel progressive hedging under equal wall-clock budgets that include data generation, training, and solve times. Where the reduced model's optimum is available, investment patterns broadly align with the benchmark. Our approach enables high-resolution uncertainty modeling at realistic system scales.

</details>


### [318] [Hybrid topology control: a dynamic leader-based distributed edge-addition and deletion mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13529)
*Kunal Garg,Xi Yu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于领导者的多机器人系统连接维护算法，通过中心节点实时重构通信图，减少决策时间并处理未知扰动和通信延迟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统需要保持通信连接以完成团队任务，但连接维护会限制机器人移动性，导致团队性能下降。现有基于共识的连接维护方法在通信延迟下效率低下，决策时间随节点数量增加，需要多轮通信

Method: 提出基于领导者的决策算法，使用中心节点进行高效实时重构，决策时间取决于图直径而非节点数量，只需一轮信息传输。开发考虑未知扰动和通信延迟的机器人位置估计方法，中心节点选择要删除的边并允许新边形成，保持新图直径在阈值内

Result: 通过大量仿真结果展示了所提方法的有效性

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效处理多机器人系统中的未知扰动和通信延迟，通过基于领导者的决策机制显著提高连接维护效率，减少决策时间并改善团队性能

Abstract: Coordinated operations of multi-robot systems (MRS) require agents to maintain communication connections to accomplish team objectives. However, maintaining the connections imposes costs in terms of restricted robot mobility, resulting in suboptimal team performance. In this work, we consider a realistic MRS framework in which agents are subject to unknown dynamical disturbances and experience communication delays. Most existing works on connectivity maintenance use consensus-based frameworks for graph reconfiguration, where decision-making time scales with the number of nodes and requires multiple rounds of communication, making them ineffective under communication delays. To address this, we propose a novel leader-based decision-making algorithm that uses a central node for efficient real-time reconfiguration, reducing decision-making time to depend on the graph diameter rather than the number of nodes and requiring only one round of information transfer through the network. We propose a novel method for estimating robot locations within the MRS that actively accounts for unknown disturbances and the communication delays. Using these position estimates, the central node selects a set of edges to delete while allowing the formation of new edges, aiming to keep the diameter of the new graph within a threshold. We provide numerous simulation results to showcase the efficacy of the proposed method.

</details>


### [319] [Single-Event Multinomial Full Kelly via Implicit State Positions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13581)
*Christopher D. Long*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文为全凯利问题提供了一个简洁的状态价格推导，通过隐含头寸视角得到了最优赌注公式和阈值规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统全凯利问题的最优公式虽然经典，但支持集选择步骤通常通过拉格朗日乘子法推导，过程较为繁琐。本文旨在提供一个更简洁的推导方法。

Method: 采用状态价格推导方法，将现金头寸c视为每个结果的隐含头寸，相当于在结果i上的基准赌注为cq_i。在活跃支持集上，显式赌注只需将有利结果从基准cq_i增加到最优总赌注p_i。

Result: 得到了最优赌注公式x_i = (p_i - c q_i)_+，阈值规则p_i/q_i > c，以及通过对p_i/q_i排序后的一遍贪心算法进行支持集选择。

Conclusion: 虽然结果在本质上与标准解相同，但隐含头寸视角提供了一个紧凑的证明和记忆解决方案的便捷方式。

Abstract: For a single event with finitely many mutually exclusive outcomes, the full Kelly problem is to maximize expected log wealth over nonnegative stakes together with an optional cash position. The optimal formula is classical, but the support-selection step is often presented via Lagrange multipliers. This note gives a shorter state-price derivation. A cash fraction $c$ acts as an implicit position in every outcome: in terminal-wealth terms, it is equivalent to a baseline stake $cq_i$ on outcome $i$, where $q_i$ is the state price. On any active support, explicit bets therefore only top up favorable outcomes from this baseline $cq_i$ to the optimal total stake $p_i$. This yields the formula $x_i = (p_i - c q_i)_+$, the threshold rule $p_i/q_i > c$, and, after sorting outcomes by $p_i/q_i$, a one-pass greedy algorithm for support selection. The result is standard in substance, but the implicit-position viewpoint gives a compact proof and a convenient way to remember the solution.

</details>


### [320] [State-space models through the lens of ensemble control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13587)
*Ye Feng,Jianfeng Lu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文将状态空间模型的训练重新表述为集合最优控制问题，推导了庞特里亚金极大值原理，并提出了基于逐次逼近法的收敛算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 状态空间模型在序列建模中表现有效，但对其训练动态缺乏严格的理论理解。作者希望通过控制理论视角来理解SSM的训练过程。

Method: 将SSM训练表述为集合最优控制问题，其中共享控制律管理输入依赖动态系统的群体。推导了该表述的庞特里亚金极大值原理，并基于此提出了逐次逼近法的迭代算法。

Result: 证明了迭代算法沿子序列收敛，并建立了全局最优性的充分条件。为SSM训练提供了控制理论视角的分析框架。

Conclusion: 该工作通过集合最优控制问题重新表述SSM训练，建立了严格的理论基础，为理解SSM训练动态提供了新的控制理论视角。

Abstract: State-space models (SSMs) are effective architectures for sequential modeling, but a rigorous theoretical understanding of their training dynamics is still lacking. In this work, we formulate the training of SSMs as an ensemble optimal control problem, where a shared control law governs a population of input-dependent dynamical systems. We derive Pontryagin's maximum principle (PMP) for this ensemble control formulation, providing necessary conditions for optimality. Motivated by these conditions, we introduce an algorithm based on the method of successive approximations. We prove convergence of this iterative scheme along a subsequence and establish sufficient conditions for global optimality. The resulting framework provides a control-theoretic perspective on SSM training.

</details>


### [321] [Feedback Control and Local Convexification of Wasserstein Gradient Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13588)
*Dante Kalise,Lucas M. Moschen,Grigorios A. Pavliotis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究具有熵正则化的自由能泛函的Wasserstein梯度流，提出基于谱分析的有限秩反馈控制方法，实现局部指数稳定性和能量凸性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究具有熵正则化的自由能泛函的Wasserstein梯度流（平均场Langevin动力学）在平稳态附近的稳定性问题，旨在设计反馈控制律来增强系统的稳定性和收敛速度。

Method: 首先将Wasserstein Hessian识别为Hilbert空间上的自伴紧算子，通过谱分析设计基于代数Riccati方程的有限秩反馈控制律，将闭环Hessian谱移动到任意指定阈值之上。

Result: 成功设计出有限秩反馈控制，使非线性闭环流以指定速率δ局部指数收敛到平稳态，在适当条件下闭环能量在坐标图中局部强凸。

Conclusion: 该框架为具有熵正则化的自由能泛函的Wasserstein梯度流提供了有效的反馈稳定化方法，并可推广到多物种系统、矩约束Fokker-Planck方程和闭黎曼流形等更广泛场景。

Abstract: For free energies of the form \[ F(μ) = E(μ) + σ\int_Ωμ\logμ\,dx, \quad σ> 0, \] we study the Wasserstein gradient flow, a continuity equation also known as mean-field Langevin dynamics, around a stationary state $\barμ$ on the flat torus. Our first result identifies the Wasserstein Hessian of $F$ at $\barμ$ with a self-adjoint operator with compact resolvent on a Hilbert space of potential variables, and shows that, up to the natural Riesz isometry, this operator generates the linearized gradient flow. This spectral description allows us to design a finite-rank feedback law, via an algebraic Riccati equation, that shifts the closed-loop Hessian spectrum above any prescribed threshold $δ> 0$. As a consequence, the nonlinear closed-loop flow converges locally exponentially to $\barμ$ with rate $δ$. Under an additional second-order remainder assumption on the first variation, the corresponding closed-loop energy is also locally strongly convex in chart coordinates. We illustrate the framework on the flat torus and discuss extensions to multi-species systems, moment-constrained Fokker-Planck equations, and closed Riemannian manifolds.

</details>


### [322] [When to Screen, When to Bypass: LLM-Judges in Resource-Scarce AI-Human Workflow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13870)
*Ruihan Lin,Jiheng Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究AI输出审核流程优化：在LLM法官筛选和人工审核之间建立最优路由策略，解决AI生成量大但人工审核能力有限的瓶颈问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI系统能大规模生成输出，但大多数输出需要人工批准才能发布，这造成了瓶颈：人类无法跟上AI生成的速度。自然解决方案是引入LLM法官来筛选输出，但法官不完美，存在误拒和误接受问题，需要优化路由策略。

Method: 将工作流建模为具有三个资源池的排队网络，使用流体近似来表征最优法官分配。分析不同瓶颈情况下的最优路由策略，考虑异质任务类别和错误结构，提出基于流体最优分配分数的路由策略。

Result: 分析显示最优分配取决于当前瓶颈资源：当审核员稀缺时，筛选能放大人工能力；但当工作人员紧张时，会产生返工陷阱。异质任务类别的最优优先级在不同操作状态下会反转，互补错误结构的类别混合可实现更高吞吐量。

Conclusion: 提出使用流体最优分配分数进行路由和流体最优服务水平进行准入控制的策略，证明其在系统规模增长时的渐近最优性。数值实验证实快速收敛到流体最优，显著优于始终筛选或从不筛选的基准策略。

Abstract: AI systems can generate outputs at scale, but most outputs require human approval before release. This creates a bottleneck: humans cannot keep pace with AI-generated volume. A natural response is to insert an LLM-judge that screens outputs before they reach humans, filtering errors and amplifying effective review capacity. But judges are imperfect. False rejections send correct outputs back for unnecessary rework; false acceptances consume judge capacity without relieving humans. When should outputs be routed through the judge, and when should they bypass it directly to human review? We model this workflow as a queueing network with three resource pools and use a fluid approximation to characterize optimal judge allocation. The analysis reveals that optimal allocation depends critically on which resource is the current bottleneck: screening amplifies human capacity when reviewers are scarce, yet generates a rework trap that crowds out new production when workers are stretched thin. For heterogeneous task classes with different error profiles, optimal priority can reverse across operating regimes, and classes with complementary error structures can be mixed to achieve throughput that neither class attains alone. We propose a policy that uses the fluid-optimal allocation fractions for routing and the fluid-optimal service levels for admission control, and establish its asymptotic optimality as system scale grows. Extensions incorporate human feedback that improves rework quality and joint capacity planning under budget constraints. Numerical experiments confirm rapid convergence to the fluid optimum and demonstrate that the policy significantly outperforms benchmarks that either always screen or never screen.

</details>


### [323] [Tractable bank capital structure: optimal control under Basel III constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14557)
*Erhan Bayraktar,Etienne Chevalier,Vathana Ly Vath,Yuqiong Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 银行在巴塞尔III约束下的最优风险管理策略：通过杠杆率的一维模型，得到简单可解释的分红与资本补充策略，并分析监管参数对安全性与盈利性的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 银行需要在巴塞尔III严格的偿付能力和流动性约束下，同时优化风险投资、股息支付和资本结构，而昂贵的股权发行作为困境恢复工具。需要找到在监管约束下的最优风险管理策略。

Method: 将高维资产负债表动态简化为杠杆率的一维随机控制问题，采用状态依赖的投资限制。通过反射边界和跳跃过程描述最优策略：在上边界分红，在困境边界进行资本补充至目标水平。通过蒙特卡洛模拟求解外部优化问题，分析监管参数的影响。

Result: 得到简单可解释的最优策略：在杠杆率上边界支付股息，在困境边界进行资本补充至唯一目标水平。阈值可解析表征，对监管参数敏感。监管视角下，收紧偿付能力要求通常能提供最佳的安全性与盈利性权衡。

Conclusion: 研究为银行在巴塞尔III约束下的风险管理提供了理论框架和实用策略，表明严格的偿付能力监管能有效平衡股东价值与银行生存概率，杠杆率上限在某些情况下可能不是最优选择。

Abstract: Banks must optimize risky investments, dividend payouts, and capital structure under tight Basel III solvency and liquidity constraints, while costly equity issuance serves as a distress-recovery tool. We formulate this as a stochastic control problem that reduces the high-dimensional balance-sheet dynamics to a tractable one-dimensional process in the leverage ratio, with state-dependent investment limits. The resulting policy is simple and interpretable: pay dividends at an upper reflection barrier and, when needed, recapitalize only at the distress boundary, jumping to a unique target level. We characterize these thresholds analytically and show their sensitivity to regulatory parameters. From a regulatory viewpoint, we solve an outer optimization problem that maps the efficient frontier between shareholder value and survival probability (via Monte Carlo), with and without leverage caps. Results highlight that tightening solvency requirements often yields the best safety-profitability trade-off.

</details>


### [324] [The Effective Lasserre's Perturbative Positivstellensatz](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13954)
*Igor Klep,Victor Magron,Matthias Schötz*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究无界域上多项式优化的SOS证书，通过加权多项式尾部扰动方法，给出了实现ε精度证书所需截断阶数N的显式定量界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究无界域上多项式优化的SOS（平方和）证书问题，特别是如何为无界域上的非负多项式构造有效的SOS表示，这是多项式优化中的核心挑战。

Method: 基于Lasserre的扰动方法，考虑多项式p的SOS表示，并增加加权多项式尾部项∑_{n=0}^N (x·x)^n/(n!)^t（0<t<1），利用Mehler核的正性性质和多项式核方法技术。

Result: 获得了实现ε精度证书所需截断阶数N的显式定量界限：N = O((‖p‖/ε)^{1/(1-t)})，表明N以1/ε的多项式速率增长。

Conclusion: 该研究为无界域上的多项式优化提供了有效的SOS证书构造方法，通过加权尾部扰动获得了多项式增长的截断阶数界限，改进了现有结果。

Abstract: We study sum-of-squares (SOS) certificates for nonnegative polynomials $p$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$ and their implications for polynomial optimization over unbounded domains. Building on Lasserre's perturbation approach, we consider SOS representations of $p$ augmented by weighted polynomial tails of the form $\sum_{n=0}^N (x\cdot x)^n/(n!)^t$ for $0 < t < 1$. Our main result provides an explicit quantitative bound on the truncation order $N$ required to achieve an $\varepsilon$-accurate certificate. Using positivity properties of the Mehler kernel and techniques inspired by polynomial kernel methods, we show that $N$ grows polynomially in $1/\varepsilon$, with rate $N = O((\|p\|/\varepsilon)^{1/(1-t)})$.

</details>


### [325] [Distributional Uncertainty and Adaptive Decision-Making in System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14047)
*Yujun Huang,Gioele Zardini*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分布式的协同设计扩展框架，将不确定设计结果建模为设计问题上的分布，支持自适应决策过程，解决了传统区间模型无法表达概率风险和自适应决策的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂工程系统需要在异构组件之间进行协调设计选择，面临多目标冲突和规格不确定的问题。现有的不确定协同设计模型依赖区间边界，虽然支持最坏情况推理，但无法表示概率风险或多阶段自适应决策。

Method: 开发了协同设计的分布式扩展，将不确定设计结果建模为设计问题上的分布，通过马尔可夫核重新参数化支持自适应决策过程。使用准可测和准通用空间，证明标准协同设计互连操作在这种更丰富的不确定性概念下仍然保持组合性。

Result: 引入了查询和观测机制来提取概率设计权衡，包括可行性概率、置信边界和最小所需资源的分布。通过任务驱动的无人机案例研究，展示了该框架能够捕捉基于区间模型无法表达的风险敏感和信息依赖设计选择。

Conclusion: 提出的分布式协同设计框架扩展了传统单调协同设计的能力，能够更好地处理概率风险和自适应决策，为复杂工程系统的设计提供了更强大的建模和分析工具。

Abstract: Complex engineered systems require coordinated design choices across heterogeneous components under multiple conflicting objectives and uncertain specifications. Monotone co-design provides a compositional framework for such problems by modeling each subsystem as a design problem: a feasible relation between provided functionalities and required resources in partially ordered sets. Existing uncertain co-design models rely on interval bounds, which support worst-case reasoning but cannot represent probabilistic risk or multi-stage adaptive decisions. We develop a distributional extension of co-design that models uncertain design outcomes as distributions over design problems and supports adaptive decision processes through Markov-kernel re-parameterizations. Using quasi-measurable and quasi-universal spaces, we show that the standard co-design interconnection operations remain compositional under this richer notion of uncertainty. We further introduce queries and observations that extract probabilistic design trade-offs, including feasibility probabilities, confidence bounds, and distributions of minimal required resources. A task-driven unmanned aerial vehicle case study illustrates how the framework captures risk-sensitive and information-dependent design choices that interval-based models cannot express.

</details>


### [326] [Schrödinger Bridge Over A Compact Connected Lie Group](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14049)
*Hamza Mahmood,Abhishek Halder,Adeel Akhtar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 在紧致连通李群上研究薛定谔桥问题，通过几何控制器最优插值概率密度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究李群上受控扩散在给定初始和终端密度之间的最优控制问题，旨在避免局部参数化或欧几里得嵌入带来的限制

Method: 开发了坐标无关的随机最优控制问题表述，尊重李群的几何结构，建立了对应薛定谔系统解的存在唯一性

Result: 推导出几何控制器，能够最优地插值李群上的概率密度，并在SO(2)和SO(3)上提供了数值示例

Conclusion: 成功解决了李群上的薛定谔桥问题，建立了几何框架下的最优控制理论，为李群上的概率密度插值提供了有效方法

Abstract: This work studies the Schrödinger bridge problem for the kinematic equation on a compact connected Lie group. The objective is to steer a controlled diffusion between given initial and terminal densities supported over the Lie group while minimizing the control effort. We develop a coordinate-free formulation of this stochastic optimal control problem that respects the underlying geometric structure of the Lie group, thereby avoiding limitations associated with local parameterizations or embeddings in Euclidean spaces. We establish the existence and uniqueness of solution to the corresponding Schrödinger system. Our results are constructive in that they derive a geometric controller that optimally interpolates probability densities supported over the Lie group. To illustrate the results, we provide numerical examples on $\mathsf{SO}(2)$ and $\mathsf{SO}(3)$.

</details>


### [327] [Chaos-Free Networks are Stable Recurrent Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14106)
*Stefano De Carli,Davide Previtali,Mirko Mazzoleni,Fabio Previdi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种解耦门网络(DGN)，作为混沌自由网络(CFN)的结构变体，能够无条件满足增量输入状态稳定性(delta-ISS)，为非线性系统辨识提供了具有严格稳定性保证的架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 门控循环神经网络(RNNs)在非线性系统辨识中精度高，但常表现出复杂的混沌动力学特性，难以分析。虽然混沌自由网络(CFN)被提出以消除标准门控RNNs中的混沌行为，但确保增量输入状态稳定性(delta-ISS)仍需要特定的参数约束。

Method: 首先形式化证明CFN满足输入状态稳定性(ISS)，但增量ISS需要特定参数约束。为此提出解耦门网络(DGN)，这是CFN的结构变体，移除了门控机制中的内部状态连接。证明DGN无条件满足增量ISS特性。

Result: DGN能够无条件满足增量ISS特性，为非线性动态系统辨识提供了增量稳定的架构，无需复杂的网络训练修改。数值结果证实DGN保持了标准架构的建模能力，同时遵守严格的稳定性保证。

Conclusion: DGN作为CFN的结构变体，通过移除门控机制中的内部状态连接，无条件满足增量ISS，为非线性系统辨识提供了具有严格稳定性保证的架构，同时保持了建模能力。

Abstract: Gated Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) are widely used for nonlinear system identification due to their high accuracy, although they often exhibit complex, chaotic dynamics that are difficult to analyze. This paper investigates the system-theoretic properties of the Chaos-Free Network (CFN), an architecture originally proposed to eliminate the chaotic behavior found in standard gated RNNs. First, we formally prove that the CFN satisfies Input-to-State Stability (ISS) by design. However, we demonstrate that ensuring Incremental ISS (delta-ISS) still requires specific parametric constraints on the CFN architecture. Then, to address this, we introduce the Decoupled-Gate Network (DGN), a novel structural variant of the CFN that removes internal state connections in the gating mechanisms. Finally, we prove that the DGN unconditionally satisfies the delta-ISS property, providing an incrementally stable architecture for identifying nonlinear dynamical systems without requiring complex network training modifications. Numerical results confirm that the DGN maintains the modeling capabilities of standard architectures while adhering to these rigorous stability guarantees.

</details>


### [328] [Strong convergence, perturbation resilience and superiorization of Generalized Modular String-Averaging with infinitely many input operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14270)
*Kay Barshad,Yair Censor*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了基于广义模块化串平均（GMSA）过程的迭代算法在无限算子序列下的强收敛性和有界扰动鲁棒性，应用于实Hilbert空间中的可行性问题，并探索了在优越化方法和动态串平均中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究无限算子序列下广义模块化串平均算法的强收敛性和有界扰动鲁棒性，为实Hilbert空间中的可行性问题（如公共不动点问题和凸可行性问题）提供更通用的算法框架。

Method: 提出基于广义模块化串平均（GMSA）过程的迭代算法，考虑无限输入算子序列和一般可容许控制。研究强拟非扩张算子的情况，并特别关注其对应的松弛严格非扩张算子子类以建立有界扰动鲁棒性。

Result: 证明了GMSA框架下算法的强收敛性，建立了有界扰动鲁棒性，并将结果应用于优越化方法和动态串平均，分析了主要算法的优越化版本的行为。

Conclusion: 该工作不仅包含多种早期算法作为特例，更重要的是通过模块化串平均选项产生了新的算法方案，特别适用于无限多输入算子情况，其强收敛保证以及在优越化和动态串平均中的应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: We study the strong convergence and bounded perturbation resilience of iterative algorithms based on the Generalized Modular String-Averaging (GMSA) procedure for infinite sequences of input operators under a general admissible control. These methods address a variety of feasibility-seeking problems in real Hilbert spaces, including the common fixed point problem and the convex feasibility problem. In addition to the general case, involving certain strongly quasi-nonexpansive input operators, we consider a specific subclass of their corresponding relaxed firmly nonexpansive operators. This subclass proves useful for establishing bounded perturbation resilience. We further demonstrate the applicability of our strong convergence results, within the GMSA framework, to the Superiorization Methodology and to Dynamic String-Averaging, analyzing the behavior of a superiorized version of our main algorithm. The novelty and significance of this work is that it not only includes a variety of earlier algorithms as special cases but, more importantly, it allows the use of modular options of string-averaging that give rise to new, hitherto unavailable, algorithmic schemes with emphasis on infinitely many input operators. The strong convergence guarantees and the applications for superiorization and dynamic string-averaging are also important facets.

</details>


### [329] [Second order necessary conditions for quantum stochastic optimal control problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14277)
*Penghui Wang,Shan Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文为量子随机系统的最优控制建立了二阶必要条件，采用变分方法分析由费米子布朗运动驱动的量子随机微分方程系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子随机控制领域需要建立类似经典随机控制的数学理论基础，特别是二阶必要条件对于优化问题的深入分析和实际应用至关重要。

Method: 采用变分方法，类似于经典随机控制中的技术，分析由费米子布朗运动驱动的量子随机微分方程系统，其中控制项同时出现在漂移项和扩散项中。

Result: 建立了量子随机系统最优控制的二阶必要条件，为量子随机控制领域的优化问题提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 该研究为量子随机控制领域的优化问题建立了重要的数学基础，为进一步的理论探索和实际应用提供了支持。

Abstract: This paper aims to establish second order necessary conditions for optimal control in quantum stochastic systems. We employ a variational approach, analogous to methods in classical stochastic control, to analyze systems governed by quantum stochastic differential equations driven by fermionic Brownian motion, where the control enters both the drift and diffusion terms. This result provides a theoretical foundation for further exploration of optimization problems and their practical applications in the field of quantum stochastic control.

</details>


### [330] [A Convergence-Guaranteed Algorithm for Stochastic Optimal Control Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14310)
*Mohsen Amidzadeh*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出基于Malliavin微积分的随机最优控制问题新方法，无需伴随过程，降低维度灾难


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于随机最大值原理的迭代算法需要伴随过程（后向随机微分方程），计算复杂且加剧维度灾难，需要更高效的替代方案

Method: 基于Malliavin微积分开发新的随机最大值原理，设计无需伴随过程的迭代算法，利用前向模拟器高效计算Malliavin导数

Result: 与标准迭代算法相比，新方法缓解了维度瓶颈，在考虑的随机最优控制问题上表现出竞争力

Conclusion: 基于Malliavin微积分的方法为随机最优控制问题提供了更高效的计算框架，避免了传统伴随过程的复杂性

Abstract: Stochastic Optimal Control Problems (SOCPs) plays a major role in the sequential decision-making challenges. There exist various iterative algorithms, under framework of stochastic maximum principle, that sequentially find the optimal control decision. However, they are based on the adjoint sensitivity analysis that necessitates simulation of an adjoint process, typically a backward stochastic differential equation (SDE) that must simultaneously be adapted to a forward filtration and satisfy a terminal condition, which substantially increases complexity and exacerbates the curse of dimensionality. We instead develop a stochastic maximum principle based on the Malliavin calculus, which enables us to devise an iterative algorithm without need of an adjoint process. Our algorithm however needs the Malliavin derivative that can be efficiently computed based on a forward simulator. Empirical comparisons against standard iterative algorithms demonstrate that our approach alleviates the dimensionality bottleneck while delivering competitive performance on the considered SOCPs.

</details>


### [331] [Online Learning for Supervisory Switching Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14762)
*Haoyuan Sun,Ali Jadbabaie*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于多臂老虎机算法的监督切换控制方法，用于部分观测线性动态系统，能在有限时间内识别最佳控制器并保证系统稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统监督控制缺乏有限时间性能保证，而现有的非渐近方法需要稳定性假设，无法测试可能不稳定的控制器。需要一种能在有限时间内识别最佳控制器并处理不稳定候选控制器的方法。

Method: 提出数据驱动的监督控制算法，采用多臂老虎机框架，通过评分准则评估候选控制器，利用系统可观测性分离历史状态影响，同时检测不稳定控制器并准确识别系统。

Result: 提出两种算法变体，具有维度无关的有限时间保证，能在O(N log N)步内识别最合适的控制器，同时实现对系统扰动的有限L2增益。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了监督控制中有限时间性能分析的空白，将多臂老虎机算法成功应用于控制理论挑战，为部分观测线性系统提供了实用的控制器选择方法。

Abstract: We study supervisory switching control for partially-observed linear dynamical systems. The objective is to identify and deploy the best controller for the unknown system by periodically selecting among a collection of $N$ candidate controllers, some of which may destabilize the underlying system. While classical estimator-based supervisory control guarantees asymptotic stability, it lacks quantitative finite-time performance bounds. Conversely, current non-asymptotic methods in both online learning and system identification require restrictive assumptions that are incompatible in a control setting, such as system stability, which preclude testing potentially unstable controllers. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel, non-asymptotic analysis of supervisory control that adapts multi-armed bandit algorithms to address these control-theoretic challenges. Our data-driven algorithm evaluates candidate controllers via scoring criteria that leverage system observability to isolate the effects of historical states, enabling both detection of destabilizing controllers and accurate system identification. We present two algorithmic variants with dimension-free, finite-time guarantees, where each identifies the most suitable controller in $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ steps, while simultaneously achieving finite $L_2$-gain with respect to system disturbances.

</details>


### [332] [Free Final Time Adaptive Mesh Covariance Steering via Sequential Convex Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14868)
*Joshua Pilipovsky*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种用于非线性随机微分方程自由终端时间协方差控制的序列凸规划框架，通过时间归一化和自适应时间网格优化控制策略与时间分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协方差控制方法通常固定终端时间，无法同时优化控制策略和时间分配。对于具有加性和乘性扩散的非线性随机系统，需要更精确的协方差传播方法。

Method: 采用时间归一化处理自由终端时间目标，引入每区间时间膨胀变量实现自适应离散化网格。推导精确的局部线性随机模型（保留乘性结构），通过锥/半定协方差控制松弛求解每个SCP子问题，处理终端矩约束和状态/控制机会约束。

Result: 在具有阻力和速度相关扩散的非线性双积分器上的数值实验验证了该方法能通过自适应时间分配实现自由终端时间最小化，相对于冻结扩散线性化方法提高了协方差精度。

Conclusion: 提出的SCP框架成功解决了具有加性和乘性扩散的非线性随机系统的自由终端时间协方差控制问题，实现了控制策略和时间网格的联合优化，提高了协方差传播的准确性。

Abstract: In this paper we develop a sequential convex programming (SCP) framework for free-final-time covariance steering of nonlinear stochastic differential equations (SDEs) subject to both additive and multiplicative diffusion. We cast the free-final-time objective through a time-normalization and introduce per-interval time-dilation variables that induce an adaptive discretization mesh, enabling the simultaneous optimization of the control policy and the temporal grid. A central difficulty is that, under multiplicative noise, accurate covariance propagation within SCP requires retaining the first-order diffusion linearization and its coupling with time dilation. We therefore derive the exact local linear stochastic model (preserving the multiplicative structure) and introduce a tractable discretization that maintains the associated diffusion terms, after which each SCP subproblem is solved via conic/semidefinite covariance-steering relaxations with terminal moment constraints and state/control chance constraints. Numerical experiments on a nonlinear double-integrator with drag and velocity-dependent diffusion validate free-final-time minimization through adaptive time allocation and improved covariance accuracy relative to frozen-diffusion linearizations.

</details>


### [333] [The impact of machine learning forecasting on strategic decision-making for Bike Sharing Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14901)
*Enrico Angelelli,Andrea Mor,Carlotta Orsenigo,M. Grazia Speranza,Carlo Vercellis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 使用机器学习预测共享单车站点借还车差异，集成到仿真框架中支持长期决策和日常动态建模，基于意大利布雷西亚真实数据评估预测质量和仿真效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共享单车系统需要有效管理站点间的车辆分布，预测借还车差异对于优化车辆调度和长期规划至关重要。

Method: 采用机器学习技术预测每个站点的借还车差异，将预测结果集成到仿真框架中，用于支持长期决策和日常动态建模，包括车辆重新分配。

Result: 基于意大利布雷西亚真实数据评估，一方面比较了机器学习预测与其他预测方法的性能，另一方面分析了预测质量对仿真框架输出结果的影响。

Conclusion: 机器学习预测方法在共享单车系统管理中具有实用价值，能够有效支持长期决策和日常运营优化。

Abstract: In this paper, machine learning techniques are used to forecast the difference between bike returns and withdrawals at each station of a bike sharing system. The forecasts are integrated into a simulation framework that is used to support long-term decisions and model the daily dynamics, including the relocation of bikes. We assess the quality of the machine learning-based forecasts in two ways. Firstly, we compare the forecasts with alternative prediction methods. Secondly, we analyze the impact of the forecasts on the quality of the output of the simulation framework. The evaluation is based on real-world data of the bike sharing system currently operating in Brescia, Italy.

</details>


### [334] [Optimal control of a tumor growth model with hyperbolic relaxation of the chemical potential](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14960)
*Pierluigi Colli,Elisabetta Rocca,Jürgen Sprekels*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 研究肿瘤生长Cahn-Hilliard型相场模型的最优控制，其中化学势的抛物线松弛被双曲线松弛替代，涵盖正则和对数型双阱势，建立控制-状态算子的Fréchet可微性，推导一阶必要最优性条件，并得到最优控制的稀疏性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统肿瘤生长相场模型通常假设化学势具有抛物线松弛，本文研究用双曲线松弛替代的情况，这能更准确地描述某些生物物理过程。同时考虑正则和对数型双阱势，使模型更具一般性，旨在建立该模型的最优控制理论框架。

Method: 采用相场建模方法，将肿瘤生长描述为Cahn-Hilliard型方程，但用双曲线松弛替代传统的抛物线松弛。在适当的Banach空间中分析控制-状态算子的Fréchet可微性，通过变分方法推导一阶必要最优性条件，建立伴随状态变量的变分不等式。

Result: 成功证明了控制-状态算子在合适Banach空间中的Fréchet可微性，建立了包含伴随状态变量的一阶必要最优性条件（变分不等式）。利用这些最优性条件推导出最优控制的稀疏性结果，即最优控制往往只在部分区域非零。

Conclusion: 本文为具有双曲线松弛的肿瘤生长相场模型建立了完整的最优控制理论框架，涵盖正则和对数型双阱势。所得结果不仅提供了理论保证，还揭示了最优控制的稀疏特性，为实际肿瘤治疗控制策略的设计提供了数学基础。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the optimal control of a phase field model for a tumor growth model of Cahn--Hilliard type in which the often assumed parabolic relaxation of the chemical potential is replaced by a hyperbolic one. Both the cases when the double-well potential governing the phase evolution is of either regular or logarithmic type are covered by the analysis. We show the Fréchet differentiability of the associated control-to-state operator in suitable Banach spaces and establish first-order necessary optimality conditions in terms of a variational inequality involving the adjoint state variables. The necessary optimality conditions are then used to derive sparsity results for the optimal controls.

</details>


### [335] [Riemannian Optimization Framework on the Generalized Quaternionic Stiefel Manifold](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15111)
*Hiroyuki Sato*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文引入了广义四元数Stiefel流形，研究了其黎曼几何性质用于优化，推导了相关几何量表达式，并应用于广义四元数特征值问题求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Stiefel流形研究主要集中在实数和复数域，四元数域的研究相对较少。广义四元数Stiefel流形在信号处理、量子力学等领域有应用潜力，需要建立其几何框架以支持黎曼优化方法。

Method: 将广义四元数Stiefel流形视为实黎曼流形，推导了切空间、法空间、正交投影、回缩映射和向量传输的显式表达式，建立了完整的几何框架。

Result: 成功建立了广义四元数Stiefel流形的几何理论，包括切空间、法空间、正交投影、回缩映射和向量传输的显式表达式，为黎曼优化提供了数学基础。

Conclusion: 提出的广义四元数Stiefel流形几何框架是有效的，能够支持黎曼优化方法解决广义四元数特征值问题，为相关应用领域提供了新的数学工具。

Abstract: This paper introduces the generalized quaternionic Stiefel manifold and studies its geometry for Riemannian optimization. We clarify its relationships with existing manifolds, especially the real generalized Stiefel manifold and the quaternionic Stiefel manifold, and derive explicit expressions for several geometric quantities on the proposed manifold. In particular, the generalized quaternionic Stiefel manifold is regarded as a real Riemannian manifold, and expressions for the tangent space, normal space, the orthogonal projection onto the tangent space, a retraction, and a vector transport on this manifold are derived. As an application, the generalized quaternionic eigenvalue problem is formulated as an optimization problem on this manifold, and a numerical example is solved by Riemannian optimization methods to demonstrate the viability of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [336] [A Parameter-Free Zeroth-Order Algorithm for Decentralized Stochastic Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15219)
*Jiawei Chen,Alexander Rogozin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种去中心化的零阶优化方法D-POEM，用于网络环境下的随机凸优化问题，无需梯度信息，仅使用局部两点函数值查询和点对点通信。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在去中心化网络环境中，当代理无法获取梯度信息（仅能查询带噪声的局部目标函数值）时，需要一种有效的零阶优化方法。现有方法通常需要先验知识（如Lipschitz常数和域直径），这在实际中难以获取。

Method: 提出D-POEM方法，结合对称两点平滑技术，采用自适应半径和步长规则，避免了对Lipschitz常数和域直径的先验知识需求。方法仅使用局部两点零阶查询和点对点通信。

Result: 对于凸Lipschitz连续目标函数，证明了收敛速率，该速率将集中式优化项与网络不一致项分离。数值实验表明POEM优于现有的分布式零阶方法。

Conclusion: D-POEM是一种有效的去中心化零阶优化方法，无需梯度信息或先验知识，通过自适应机制和网络通信实现了良好的收敛性能。

Abstract: We consider decentralized stochastic convex optimization on connected network, in which gradients of agents are unavailable and each agent can query only noisy function values of its own local objective. The goal is to minimize the average objective over a compact convex domain using only local two point zeroth-order oracles and peer-to-peer communication. We propose a decentralized POEM method (D-POEM) that combines symmetric two point smoothing with adaptive radius and stepsize rules, thereby avoiding prior knowledge of the Lipschitz constant and diameter. For convex Lipschitz continuous objectives, we prove an convergence rate that separates a centralized optimization term from a network disagreement term. We further conduct the numerical experiments to demonstrate POEM outperforms existing distributed zeroth-order method.

</details>


### [337] [A Consensus-based optimization algorithm using Gaussian processes for global optimization problems in Sobolev spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15337)
*Mahmoud Khatab,Claudia Totzeck*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于高斯过程的无限维全局优化算法，用于求解Sobolev空间中的优化问题，可处理边界条件、状态约束和ODE约束的最优控制问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将有限维的共识优化算法推广到无限维Sobolev空间，解决具有边界条件、状态约束和微分方程约束的全局优化问题

Method: 利用高斯过程从Sobolev空间采样满足边界条件和约束的函数，基于共识优化框架，通过高斯过程的边缘化性质实现无限维算法的离散化

Result: 算法能够有效处理非线性边值问题、状态约束问题以及ODE约束的最优控制问题，数值实验验证了其可行性和性能

Conclusion: 成功将共识优化算法扩展到无限维空间，基于高斯过程的框架为Sobolev空间中的约束优化问题提供了有效的数值求解方法

Abstract: We propose an algorithm to approximate solutions of global optimization problems in Sobolev spaces that follows the spirit of Consensus-based algorithms in finite dimensions. The main ingredient are Gaussian processes. In fact, we exploit their rich toolbox in order to draw sample functions from Sobolev spaces that satisfy initial values, boundary conditions or state constraints. Well-known marginalization properties of Gaussian processes help us to discretize the algorithm, that is stated in infinite dimensions, appropriately. We illustrate the performance of the algorithm and show its feasibility for nonlinear boundary value problems with state constraints as well as nonlinear optimal control problems constrained by a system of ordinary differential equations with several numerical results.

</details>


### [338] [A superposition approach for the ISS Lyapunov-Krasovskii theorem with pointwise dissipation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15346)
*Andrii Mironchenko,Fabian Wirth,Antoine Chaillet,Lucas Brivadis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文证明了对于时滞系统，只要存在具有逐点耗散的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函，且该泛函能确保一致全局稳定性，就足以保证输入到状态稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统时滞系统稳定性分析通常基于经典范数评估解的行为，但这种方法可能不够精确。作者希望开发一种基于特定LKF的稳定性理论，提供更紧的估计，并建立逐点耗散LKF与输入到状态稳定性之间的充分条件关系。

Method: 开发了一种新的稳定性理论框架，其中解的行为不是通过经典范数评估，而是通过特定的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函来评估。该方法要求LKF具有逐点耗散特性，并且能够确保系统的一致全局稳定性。

Result: 证明了对于时滞系统，只要存在具有逐点耗散的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函，并且该泛函能够确保一致全局稳定性，就足以保证系统的输入到状态稳定性。通过示例展示了该方法相对于传统方法的优势。

Conclusion: 该研究为时滞系统的稳定性分析提供了一种新框架，通过基于特定LKF的评估方法可以获得更紧的稳定性估计，并建立了逐点耗散LKF与输入到状态稳定性之间的充分条件关系，具有理论和应用价值。

Abstract: We show that the existence of a Lyapunov-Krasovskii functional (LKF) with pointwise dissipation (i.e. dissipation in terms of the current solution norm) suffices for input-to-state stability, provided that uniform global stability can also be ensured using the same LKF. To this end, we develop a stability theory, in which the behavior of solutions is not assessed through the classical norm but rather through a specific LKF, which may provide significantly tighter estimates. We discuss the advantages of our approach by means of an example.

</details>


### [339] [Mitigating Renewable-Induced Risks for Green and Conventional Ammonia Producers through Coordinated Production and Futures Trading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15360)
*Huayan Geng,Yangjun Zeng,Yiwei Qiu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出可再生能源制氨期货金融工具，结合生产决策对冲氨产量风险，通过博弈论框架协调可再生能源制氨与传统灰氨生产商在现货和期货市场的互动，提高双方利润稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源制氨面临可再生发电波动导致的氢供应和氨生产波动问题，造成生产商收入不稳定。现有工程措施（如生产调度）受物理系统限制，效果有限，需要金融工具来管理风险。

Method: 提出可再生能源制氨期货金融工具，建立可再生能源制氨和灰氨生产商的生产与交易模型，使用条件风险价值表示风险偏好。建立博弈论框架，通过纳什议价机制协调双方在耦合的氨现货和期货市场中的生产和交易策略。

Result: 基于实际系统的案例研究表明，引入可再生能源制氨期货使可再生能源制氨和灰氨生产商的条件风险价值效用分别提高5.103%和10.14%，显著改善了在可再生能源不确定性下的利润稳定性。敏感性分析进一步验证了该机制在不同可再生波动水平和容量配置下的有效性。

Conclusion: 可再生能源制氨期货是一种有效的金融工具，能够帮助可再生能源制氨和传统灰氨生产商对冲产量风险，提高利润稳定性，为可再生能源制氨的规模化发展和市场整合提供了重要支持。

Abstract: Renewable power-to-ammonia (ReP2A), which uses hydrogen produced from renewable electricity as feedstock, is a promising pathway for decarbonizing the energy, transportation, and chemical sectors. However, variability in renewable generation causes fluctuations in hydrogen supply and ammonia production, leading to revenue instability for both ReP2A producers and conventional fossil-based gray ammonia (GA) producers in the market. Existing studies mainly rely on engineering measures, such as production scheduling, to manage this risk, but their effectiveness is constrained by physical system limits. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a financial instrument termed \emph{renewable ammonia futures} and integrates it with production decisions to hedge ammonia output risk. Production and trading models are developed for both ReP2A and GA producers, with conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) used to represent risk preferences under uncertainty. A game-theoretic framework is established in which the two producers interact in coupled ammonia spot and futures markets, and a Nash bargaining mechanism coordinates their production and trading strategies. Case studies based on a real-world system show that introducing renewable ammonia futures increases the CVaR utilities of ReP2A and GA producers by 5.103% and 10.14%, respectively, improving profit stability under renewable uncertainty. Sensitivity analysis further confirms the effectiveness of the mechanism under different levels of renewable variability and capacity configurations.

</details>


### [340] [Unimodal self-oscillations and their sign-symmetry for discrete-time relay feedback systems with dead zone](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15393)
*Kang Tong,Christian Grussler,Michelle S. Chong*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了具有非负死区的离散时间线性时不变继电器反馈系统中的单峰自振荡，建立了存在性判据、周期界限和唯一性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究具有非负死区的离散时间LTI继电器反馈系统中的自振荡现象，特别关注单峰周期解的存在条件，这类系统在控制工程中具有重要应用价值。

Method: 提出基于全正性理论的新分析框架，假设系统线性部分稳定且具有严格单调递减的无限支撑脉冲响应，通过分析环路增益的正负值数量关系来研究自振荡。

Result: 证明了单峰自振荡仅在环路增益的正负值数量在给定正周期内相等时存在（即符号对称性），建立了存在条件、周期界限和唯一性结果。

Conclusion: 基于全正性理论的分析框架成功表征了具有非负死区的离散时间LTI继电器反馈系统中的单峰自振荡，为这类系统的分析和设计提供了理论基础。

Abstract: This paper characterizes self-oscillations in discrete-time linear time-invariant (LTI) relay feedback systems with nonnegative dead zone. Specifically, we aim to establish existence criteria for unimodal self-oscillations, defined as periodic solutions where the output exhibits a single-peaked period. Assuming that the linear part of system is stable, with a strictly monotonically decreasing impulse response on its infinite support, we propose a novel analytical framework based on the theory of total positivity to address this problem. We demonstrate that unimodal self-oscillations subject to mild variation-based constraints exist only if the number of positive and negative values of the system's loop gain coincides within a given strictly positive period, i.e., the self-oscillation is sign-symmetric. Building upon these findings, we derive conditions for the existence of such self-oscillations, establish tight bounds on their periods, and address the question of their uniqueness.

</details>


### [341] [Minimal enclosing balls via geodesics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15488)
*Ariel Goodwin,Adrian S. Lewis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出更简单直观的复杂度分析，改进收敛率，并首次推导出曲率有上界的测地空间中的复杂度结果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最小包围球算法通常基于几何方法，本文旨在突出其效率背后的度量要素，特别是在测地空间中的分析

Method: 采用基于测地的简单方法，在非正曲率测地空间中进行复杂度分析，并扩展到曲率有上界的测地空间

Result: 提出了更简单、直观且自包含的复杂度分析，改进了收敛率，并首次在曲率有上界的测地空间中获得了复杂度结果

Conclusion: 该方法在更一般的测地空间设置中具有理论保证，为最小包围球问题的算法分析提供了更广泛的理论基础

Abstract: Algorithms for minimal enclosing ball problems are often geometric in nature. To highlight the metric ingredients underlying their efficiency, we focus here on a particularly simple geodesic-based method. A recent subgradient-based study proved a complexity result for this method in the broad setting of geodesic spaces of nonpositive curvature. We present a simpler, intuitive and self-contained complexity analysis in that setting, which also improves the convergence rate. We furthermore derive the first complexity result for the algorithm on geodesic spaces with curvature bounded above.

</details>


### [342] [A practical randomized trust-region method to escape saddle points in high dimension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15494)
*Radu-Alexandru Dragomir,Xiaowen Jiang,Bonan Sun,Nicolas Boumal*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于随机化的信赖域方法，通过随机化共轭梯度初始化来同时实现鞍点逃逸和局部极小值收敛，解决了传统扰动梯度下降无法收敛的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扰动梯度下降(PGD)虽然能逃逸鞍点，但无法收敛且需要精确调参。需要一种既能逃逸鞍点又能在局部极小值处收敛的实用算法。

Method: 修改经典信赖域-截断共轭梯度(TR-tCG)方法：随机化tCG子问题求解器的初始化，利用tCG在鞍点附近放大随机化以逃逸，在局部极小值处吸收随机化以收敛。

Result: 提出的算法实用性强，只需对TR-tCG做微小修改，增加一个噪声尺度超参数。实现了鞍点逃逸和局部极小值收敛的平衡。

Conclusion: 通过随机化信赖域方法，成功解决了传统方法在鞍点逃逸和收敛之间的权衡问题，提供了一种实用且理论保证的优化算法。

Abstract: Without randomization, escaping the saddle points of $f \colon \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}$ requires at least $Ω(d)$ pieces of information about $f$ (values, gradients, Hessian-vector products). With randomization, this can be reduced to a polylogarithmic dependence in $d$. The prototypical algorithm to that effect is perturbed gradient descent (PGD): through sustained jitter, it reliably escapes strict saddle points. However, it also never settles: there is no convergence. What is more, PGD requires precise tuning based on Lipschitz constants and a preset target accuracy.
  To improve on this, we modify the time-tested trust-region method with truncated conjugate gradients (TR-tCG). Specifically, we randomize the initialization of tCG (the subproblem solver), and we prove that tCG automatically amplifies the randomization near saddles (to escape) and absorbs it near local minimizers (to converge). Saddle escape happens over several iterations. Accordingly, our analysis is multi-step, with several novelties.
  The proposed algorithm is practical: it essentially tracks the good behavior of TR-tCG, with three minute modifications and a single new hyperparameter (the noise scale $σ$). We provide an implementation and numerical experiments.

</details>


### [343] [A Technical Note on the Implementation and Use of PDCS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15504)
*Zhenwei Lin,Zikai Xiong,Dongdong Ge,Yinyu Ye*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: PDCS是一个用于大规模锥优化问题的原对偶一阶求解器，基于重启的原对偶混合梯度方法框架，包含自适应步长选择、自适应反射Halpern迭代、自适应重启和对角预处理等技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为解决大规模锥优化问题提供高效的一阶求解器，填补现有求解器在处理大规模问题时的性能不足。

Method: 采用重启的原对偶混合梯度方法框架，结合自适应步长选择、自适应反射Halpern迭代、自适应重启策略和对角预处理技术。

Result: 实现了PDCS求解器，提供JuMP和CVXPY接口，包含详细的使用说明和代码示例，开源在GitHub上采用Apache License 2.0许可。

Conclusion: PDCS是一个功能完整、易于使用的大规模锥优化求解器，通过先进的一阶优化技术实现了高效求解，为研究者和实践者提供了实用的工具。

Abstract: This technical note documents the implementation and use of the Primal-Dual Conic Programming Solver (PDCS), a first-order solver for large-scale conic optimization problems introduced by Lin et al. (arXiv:2505.00311). It describes the algorithmic and implementation details underlying PDCS, including the restarted primal-dual hybrid gradient method framework, adaptive step-size selection, adaptive reflected Halpern iterations, adaptive restarts, and diagonal preconditioning. It also provides practical instructions for using PDCS, including its interfaces with JuMP and CVXPY, solver options, and illustrative code examples. PDCS is available at https://github.com/ZikaiXiong/PDCS under the Apache License 2.0.

</details>


### [344] [Notes on the primal-dual algorithm for convex optimization applied to X-ray tomographic image reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15535)
*Emil Y. Sidky,Xiaochuan Pan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文为成像科学家提供Chambolle-Pock原始对偶算法的背景知识，重点在于直观解释和可预处理的算法系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帮助成像科学家理解Chambolle-Pock原始对偶算法，提供直观解释和易于预处理的算法框架

Method: 自包含的数学笔记形式，提供非光滑凸分析的基础知识，重点展示算法的直观理解和预处理方法

Result: 为成像科学家提供了理解Chambolle-Pock算法的系统性背景知识，包括算法直觉和预处理框架

Conclusion: 本文成功地为成像科学家提供了理解Chambolle-Pock原始对偶算法的实用指南，强调直观理解和算法预处理

Abstract: The purpose of these notes is to provide background on understanding the primal-dual algorithm of Chambolle and Pock [1] for imaging scientists. The presentation focuses on providing intuition and an algorithmic system that is amenable to pre-conditioning. The document aims to be self-contained, providing background on the essential facts of non-smooth convex analysis.[2]

</details>


### [345] [Saddle Point Evasion via Curvature-Regularized Gradient Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15606)
*Liraz Mudrik,Isaac Kaminer,Sean Kragelund,Abram H. Clark*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出CRGD方法，通过正则化最负Hessian特征值来逃离鞍点，实现可控收敛到二阶稳定点


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非凸优化在机器学习中很常见，鞍点是高维收敛的主要障碍。现有方法各有缺陷：梯度下降无法感知曲率，随机扰动缺乏确定性保证，牛顿法受Hessian奇异性影响

Method: 提出曲率正则化梯度动态（CRGD），在目标函数中加入对最负Hessian特征值的平滑惩罚，构建一个增强成本函数作为优化Lyapunov函数

Result: 在非凸矩阵分解实验中，CRGD在所有测试配置中都成功逃离鞍点，逃离时间随特征值间隙减小而减少，而梯度下降的逃离时间与间隙成反比增长

Conclusion: CRGD提供了一种确定性、可控速率逃离鞍点的方法，解决了非凸优化中的关键挑战

Abstract: Nonconvex optimization underlies many modern machine learning and control tasks, where saddle points pose the dominant obstacle to reliable convergence in high-dimensional settings. Escaping these saddle points deterministically and at a controllable rate remains an open challenge: gradient descent is blind to curvature, stochastic perturbation methods lack deterministic guarantees, and Newton-type approaches suffer from Hessian singularity. We present Curvature-Regularized Gradient Dynamics (CRGD), which augments the objective with a smooth penalty on the most negative Hessian eigenvalue, yielding an augmented cost that serves as an optimization Lyapunov function with user-selectable convergence rates to second-order stationary points. Numerical experiments on a nonconvex matrix factorization example confirm that CRGD escapes saddle points across all tested configurations, with escape time that decreases with the eigenvalue gap, in contrast to gradient descent, whose escape time grows inversely with the gap.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [346] [Translational Gaps in Graph Transformers for Longitudinal EHR Prediction: A Critical Appraisal of GT-BEHRT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13231)
*Krish Tadigotla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对GT-BEHRT图变换器架构的批判性综述，该架构用于电子健康记录分析，指出其在性能表现上虽有优势，但在校准、公平性、部署可行性等方面存在重要评估缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Transformer模型将临床就诊视为无序代码集合，限制了其捕捉就诊内有意义关系的能力。图变换器方法旨在解决这一限制，同时保留学习长期时间模式的能力。

Method: 对GT-BEHRT架构进行七维度分析：表示设计、预训练策略、队列构建透明度、超越区分度的评估、公平性评估、可重复性和部署可行性。

Result: GT-BEHRT在心衰预测（365天内）表现出色：AUROC 94.37±0.20，AUPRC 73.96±0.83，F1 64.70±0.85。但存在校准分析缺失、公平性评估不完整、对队列选择敏感、跨表型和预测时间范围分析有限等问题。

Conclusion: GT-BEHRT代表了EHR表示学习的重要架构进步，但在模型能够可靠支持临床决策前，需要更严格的评估，重点关注校准、公平性和部署可行性。

Abstract: Transformer-based models have improved predictive modeling on longitudinal electronic health records through large-scale self-supervised pretraining. However, most EHR transformer architectures treat each clinical encounter as an unordered collection of codes, which limits their ability to capture meaningful relationships within a visit. Graph-transformer approaches aim to address this limitation by modeling visit-level structure while retaining the ability to learn long-term temporal patterns. This paper provides a critical review of GT-BEHRT, a graph-transformer architecture evaluated on MIMIC-IV intensive care outcomes and heart failure prediction in the All of Us Research Program. We examine whether the reported performance gains reflect genuine architectural benefits and whether the evaluation methodology supports claims of robustness and clinical relevance. We analyze GT-BEHRT across seven dimensions relevant to modern machine learning systems, including representation design, pretraining strategy, cohort construction transparency, evaluation beyond discrimination, fairness assessment, reproducibility, and deployment feasibility. GT-BEHRT reports strong discrimination for heart failure prediction within 365 days, with AUROC 94.37 +/- 0.20, AUPRC 73.96 +/- 0.83, and F1 64.70 +/- 0.85. Despite these results, we identify several important gaps, including the lack of calibration analysis, incomplete fairness evaluation, sensitivity to cohort selection, limited analysis across phenotypes and prediction horizons, and limited discussion of practical deployment considerations. Overall, GT-BEHRT represents a meaningful architectural advance in EHR representation learning, but more rigorous evaluation focused on calibration, fairness, and deployment is needed before such models can reliably support clinical decision-making.

</details>


### [347] [RFX-Fuse: Breiman and Cutler's Unified ML Engine + Native Explainable Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13234)
*Chris Kuchar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RFX-Fuse实现了Breiman和Cutler原始随机森林的完整愿景，提供统一的机器学习引擎，包括分类、回归、无监督学习、相似性计算、异常检测、缺失值填补和可视化等功能，支持GPU/CPU加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习流程需要使用5个以上的独立工具（如XGBoost、FAISS、SHAP等），而原始随机森林设计本就是一个统一的ML引擎，具有多种功能，但现代库如scikit-learn从未实现这些完整功能。

Method: RFX-Fuse基于随机森林框架，通过一次生长的树集实现多种功能。主要创新包括：(1) 邻近重要性 - 提供可解释的相似性度量；(2) 数据集特定的填补验证 - 在没有真实标签的情况下评估填补方法的质量。

Result: RFX-Fuse提供了一个1-2个模型对象的替代方案，用单一树集实现现代ML流程所需的所有功能，支持GPU/CPU加速，减少了工具碎片化。

Conclusion: RFX-Fuse实现了Breiman和Cutler原始随机森林的完整愿景，为现代机器学习提供了一个统一、高效、功能全面的解决方案，显著简化了ML工作流程。

Abstract: Breiman and Cutler's original Random Forest was designed as a unified ML engine -- not merely an ensemble predictor. Their implementation included classification, regression, unsupervised learning, proximity-based similarity, outlier
  detection, missing value imputation, and visualization -- capabilities that modern libraries like scikit-learn never implemented. RFX-Fuse (Random Forests X [X=compression] -- Forest Unified Learning and Similarity Engine) delivers
  Breiman and Cutler's complete vision with native GPU/CPU support. Modern ML pipelines require 5+ separate tools -- XGBoost for prediction, FAISS for similarity, SHAP for explanations, Isolation Forest for outliers, custom code for
  importance. RFX-Fuse provides a 1 to 2 model object alternative -- a single set of trees grown once. Novel Contributions: (1) Proximity Importance -- native explainable similarity: proximity measures that samples are similar;
  proximity importance explains why. (2) Dataset-specific imputation validation for general tabular data -- ranking imputation methods by how real the imputed data looks, without ground truth labels.

</details>


### [348] [Continual Fine-Tuning with Provably Accurate and Parameter-Free Task Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13235)
*Hang Thi-Thuy Le,Long Minh Bui,Minh Hoang,Trong Nghia Hoang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种新的参数自适应方法，结合输入自适应和参数自适应的优势，通过参数无关的检索机制实现测试时自适应使用输入嵌入，提高持续微调性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续微调方法存在局限性：输入自适应方法需要持续学习检索函数且容易遗忘，参数自适应方法使用固定输入嵌入函数避免了遗忘但牺牲了表示适应性。需要结合两者的优势。

Method: 提出包含两个关键组件的方法：(1) 自适应模块组合策略，学习信息丰富的任务特定更新来保留和补充先验知识；(2) 基于聚类的检索机制，捕获每个任务的独特表示特征，实现测试时的自适应表示使用。

Result: 大量实验表明，这两个组件协同工作，在任务语义发生大幅变化时显著提高了检索和预测性能。

Conclusion: 通过理论分析和实验验证，提出了一种结合输入自适应和参数自适应优势的新方法，通过参数无关的检索机制和良好的聚类结构组织，实现了更可靠的持续微调性能。

Abstract: Continual fine-tuning aims to adapt a pre-trained backbone to new tasks sequentially while preserving performance on earlier tasks whose data are no longer available. Existing approaches fall into two categories which include input- and parameter-adaptation. Input-adaptation methods rely on retrieving the most relevant prompts at test time, but require continuously learning a retrieval function that is prone to forgetting. Parameter-adaptation methods instead use a fixed input embedding function to enable retrieval-free prediction and avoid forgetting, but sacrifice representation adaptability. To combine their best strengths, we propose a new parameter-adaptation method that enables adaptive use of input embeddings during test time with parameter-free retrieval. We derive task-retrieval error bounds for a clustering-based, parameter-free paradigm, providing theoretical guarantees that link low retrieval error to structural properties of task-specific representation clusters, revealing a fresh insight into how well-organized clustering structure will enable reliable retrieval. Motivated by this insight, our method is designed with two key components: (i) an adaptive module composition strategy that learns informative task-specific updates to preserve and complement prior knowledge, and (ii) a clustering-based retrieval mechanism that captures distinct representation signatures for each task, enabling adaptive representation use at test time. Extensive experiments show that these components work synergistically to improve retrieval and predictive performance under large shifts in task semantics.

</details>


### [349] [Introducing Feature-Based Trajectory Clustering, a clustering algorithm for longitudinal data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13254)
*Marie-Pierre Sylvestre,Laurence Boulanger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种新的纵向数据聚类算法，通过两步法将个体映射到欧氏空间后使用谱聚类识别具有相似时间演化特征的群体


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向数据中个体的时间依赖变量演化方式各不相同，但可能存在许多个体共享的共性特征。需要一种方法能够识别出具有相似时间演化特征模式的个体集群。

Method: 采用两步法：第一步通过特定数学公式将每个个体映射到欧氏空间中的点，这些坐标旨在捕捉各种特征性时间演化模式；第二步对生成的点云应用谱聚类算法来发现集群。

Result: 提出了一种新的纵向数据聚类框架，能够有效识别具有相似时间演化特征的个体群体。

Conclusion: 该方法通过特征提取和谱聚类的结合，为纵向数据分析提供了一种有效的聚类解决方案，能够发现共享特定时间演化模式的个体集群。

Abstract: We present a new algorithm for clustering longitudinal data. Data of this type can be conceptualized as consisting of individuals and, for each such individual, observations of a time-dependent variable made at various times. Generically, the specific way in which this variable evolves with time is different from one individual to the next. However, there may also be commonalities; specific characteristic features of the time evolution shared by many individuals. The purpose of the method we put forward is to find clusters of individual whose underlying time-dependent variables share such characteristic features. This is done in two steps. The first step identifies each individual to a point in Euclidean space whose coordinates are determined by specific mathematical formulae meant to capture a variety of characteristic features. The second step finds the clusters by applying the Spectral Clustering algorithm to the resulting point cloud.

</details>


### [350] [Your Code Agent Can Grow Alongside You with Structured Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13258)
*Yi-Xuan Deng,Xiaoqin Liu,Yi Zhang,Guo-Wei Yang,Shuojin Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MemCoder是一个通过历史项目经验和实时反馈实现AI与人类持续协同进化的框架，在复杂软件工程任务中显著提升代码代理的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码代理局限于静态代码快照，无法利用项目历史中的时间演化信息和"推理轨迹"，导致行为逻辑僵化、缺乏自主适应性，难以处理复杂的仓库级问题。

Method: MemCoder框架包含三个核心机制：1) 从历史提交中提取意图到代码的映射；2) 基于验证反馈的自我精炼机制实时修正代理行为；3) 经验内化机制将人类验证的解决方案固化成长效知识。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified基准测试中，MemCoder不仅达到最先进性能，而且比通用基础模型DeepSeek-V3.2的解决率提高了9.4%。

Conclusion: 通过项目历史和实时反馈赋予代理与人类协同进化的能力，能够有效释放通用模型在复杂软件工程任务中的潜力。

Abstract: While "Intent-oriented programming" (or "Vibe Coding") redefines software engineering, existing code agents remain tethered to static code snapshots. Consequently, they struggle to model the critical information embedded in the temporal evolution of projects, failing to leverage the "reasoning trajectories" implicit in past successful practices. This limitation results in rigid behavioral logic and a lack of autonomous adaptability, ultimately hindering their ability to tackle complex, repository-level problems. To bridge this static-dynamic mismatch, we propose MemCoder, a framework designed to enable continual human-AI co-evolution. MemCoder first structures historical human experience to distill latent intent-to-code mappings from past commits. It then employs a self-refinement mechanism driven by verification feedback to correct agent behavior in real-time. Crucially, an experience self-internalization mechanism is introduced to crystallize human-validated solutions into long-term knowledge, thereby supporting sustained evolution. Experimental results on SWE-bench Verified demonstrate that MemCoder not only achieves State-of-the-Art (SOTA) performance but also delivers a 9.4% improvement in resolved rate over the general foundation model DeepSeek-V3.2. These findings indicate that equipping agents with the capability to co-evolve with humans via project history and real-time feedback effectively unlocks the potential of general models in complex software engineering tasks.

</details>


### [351] [Beyond Attention: True Adaptive World Models via Spherical Kernel Operator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13263)
*Vladimer Khasia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出球形核算子(SKO)框架，替代传统注意力机制，通过将数据流形投影到统一超球面并使用超球面多项式进行积分重构，克服了传统方法的数学缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于潜空间的世界模型存在数学缺陷：1）仅将流形学习问题转移到潜空间，数据分布变化时潜流形随之变化；2）点积注意力等正算子存在饱和现象，预测能力受限且易受维度灾难影响。

Method: 引入球形核算子(SKO)框架：1）将未知数据流形投影到统一环境超球面；2）使用局部化超球面(Gegenbauer)多项式序列；3）直接积分重构目标函数；4）将非归一化输出形式化为真实度量支撑估计器。

Result: SKO显著加速收敛，在自回归语言建模任务中优于标准注意力基线。其近似误差界严格依赖于内在流形维度q而非环境维度，且数学上解耦了真实环境转移动态与智能体观测频率偏差。

Conclusion: SKO为世界模型构建提供了数学严谨的范式，通过重新定义核心预测机制，克服了传统方法的数学缺陷，为构建更鲁棒、高效的世界模型提供了新方向。

Abstract: The pursuit of world model based artificial intelligence has predominantly relied on projecting high-dimensional observations into parameterized latent spaces, wherein transition dynamics are subsequently learned. However, this conventional paradigm is mathematically flawed: it merely displaces the manifold learning problem into the latent space. When the underlying data distribution shifts, the latent manifold shifts accordingly, forcing the predictive operator to implicitly relearn the new topological structure. Furthermore, by classical approximation theory, positive operators like dot product attention inevitably suffer from the saturation phenomenon, permanently bottlenecking their predictive capacity and leaving them vulnerable to the curse of dimensionality. In this paper, we formulate a mathematically rigorous paradigm for world model construction by redefining the core predictive mechanism. Inspired by Ryan O'Dowd's foundational work we introduce Spherical Kernel Operator (SKO), a framework that replaces standard attention. By projecting the unknown data manifold onto a unified ambient hypersphere and utilizing a localized sequence of ultraspherical (Gegenbauer) polynomials, SKO performs direct integral reconstruction of the target function. Because this localized spherical polynomial kernel is not strictly positive, it bypasses the saturation phenomenon, yielding approximation error bounds that depend strictly on the intrinsic manifold dimension q, rather than the ambient dimension. Furthermore, by formalizing its unnormalized output as an authentic measure support estimator, SKO mathematically decouples the true environmental transition dynamics from the biased observation frequency of the agent. Empirical evaluations confirm that SKO significantly accelerates convergence and outperforms standard attention baselines in autoregressive language modeling.

</details>


### [352] [Federated Personal Knowledge Graph Completion with Lightweight Large Language Models for Personalized Recommendations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13264)
*Fernando Spadea,Oshani Seneviratne*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedTREK-LM是一个结合轻量级大语言模型、个人知识图谱、联邦学习和Kahneman-Tversky优化的框架，用于去中心化个性化推荐，在电影和食谱推荐任务上比现有方法有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化推荐越来越依赖用户隐私数据，需要能够在不集中用户信息的情况下适应个体需求的解决方案。

Method: 结合轻量级大语言模型(LLMs)、演化个人知识图谱(PKGs)、联邦学习(FL)和Kahneman-Tversky优化，通过结构化PKGs提示LLMs进行上下文感知推理。

Result: 在三个轻量级Qwen3模型(0.6B, 1.7B, 4B)上，FedTREK-LM显著优于最先进的KG补全和联邦推荐基线方法(HAKE, KBGAT, FedKGRec)，在电影和食物基准测试中F1分数提升超过4倍。真实用户数据对个性化效果至关重要，合成数据会使性能下降高达46%。

Conclusion: FedTREK-LM为基于LLM的自适应个性化提供了一个实用范式，能够泛化到去中心化、演化的用户PKGs场景。

Abstract: Personalized recommendation increasingly relies on private user data, motivating approaches that can adapt to individuals without centralizing their information. We present Federated Targeted Recommendations with Evolving Knowledge graphs and Language Models (FedTREK-LM), a framework that unifies lightweight large language models (LLMs), evolving personal knowledge graphs (PKGs), federated learning (FL), and Kahneman-Tversky Optimization to enable scalable, decentralized personalization. By prompting LLMs with structured PKGs, FedTREK-LM performs context-aware reasoning for personalized recommendation tasks such as movie and recipe suggestions. Across three lightweight Qwen3 models (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B), FedTREK-LM consistently and substantially outperforms state-of-the-art KG completion and federated recommendation baselines (HAKE, KBGAT, and FedKGRec), achieving more than a 4x improvement in F1-score on the movie and food benchmarks. Our results further show that real user data is critical for effective personalization, as synthetic data degrades performance by up to 46%. Overall, FedTREK-LM offers a practical paradigm for adaptive, LLM-powered personalization that generalizes across decentralized, evolving user PKGs.

</details>


### [353] [Knowledge, Rules and Their Embeddings: Two Paths towards Neuro-Symbolic JEPA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13265)
*Yongchao Huang,Hassan Raza*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RiJEPA双向神经符号框架，通过能量约束和多模态双编码器将结构化归纳偏置注入JEPA训练，同时将离散符号规则松弛为连续可微逻辑，实现连续规则发现和梯度引导推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代自监督预测架构能捕捉复杂统计相关性但缺乏可验证的人类逻辑机制，容易受虚假相关性和捷径学习影响；而传统基于规则的推理系统虽提供严谨可解释逻辑，但存在离散边界和NP-hard组合爆炸问题。需要桥接这两类方法。

Method: 提出Rule-informed Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (RiJEPA)双向神经符号框架：1) 通过能量约束和多模态双编码器将结构化归纳偏置注入JEPA训练，重塑表示流形；2) 将刚性离散符号规则松弛为连续可微逻辑，利用梯度引导的Langevin扩散在规则能量景观中进行连续规则发现。

Result: 在合成拓扑模拟和高风险临床用例上的实证评估证实了方法的有效性，实现了无条件联合生成、条件前向和溯因推理、边缘预测翻译等新范式。

Conclusion: 该框架为鲁棒、生成式和可解释的神经符号表示学习建立了强大基础，成功桥接了统计学习与符号推理的鸿沟。

Abstract: Modern self-supervised predictive architectures excel at capturing complex statistical correlations from high-dimensional data but lack mechanisms to internalize verifiable human logic, leaving them susceptible to spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Conversely, traditional rule-based inference systems offer rigorous, interpretable logic but suffer from discrete boundaries and NP-hard combinatorial explosion. To bridge this divide, we propose a bidirectional neuro-symbolic framework centered around Rule-informed Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (RiJEPA). In the first direction, we inject structured inductive biases into JEPA training via Energy-Based Constraints (EBC) and a multi-modal dual-encoder architecture. This fundamentally reshapes the representation manifold, replacing arbitrary statistical correlations with geometrically sound logical basins. In the second direction, we demonstrate that by relaxing rigid, discrete symbolic rules into a continuous, differentiable logic, we can bypass traditional combinatorial search for new rule generation.
